claim: Gaskiya: Wani dan majalisar Belgium bai bukaci 'yan Belgium su bar Belgium ko Turai ba
evidence: Wani dan majalisa ya yi kira ga mutanen da suka damu da tufafin Musulunci a wani karamar birnin Brussels su zauna a wani ɓangare na babban birnin Belgium, ba ga 'yan ƙasar Belgium su bar ƙasar ko Turai ba, sabanin abubuwan da aka wallafa a yanar gizo.An raba wani bidiyo na dakika 25 na Saliha Raiss tana magana a taron majalisar a Molenbeek-Saint-Jean a ranar 27 ga watan Agusta a kan Instagram tare da ikirarin cewa ta yi kira ga "Yarjejeniyar Turai ba tare da Turawa ba".A ranar 1 ga Satumba, wani sabon shafin yanar gizo ya buɗe, wanda Raiss ya yi amfani da shi da ƙarya ya ce: Wadanda ba za su iya yarda da mata masu rufe fuska ko addinin Islama a Belgium su bar ƙasar ba su kamata su bar ƙasar ba!Reuters ImageElon Musk ya buɗe sabon shafin yanar gizo a kan X daidai da: Belgians leave Belgium!? Wannan hauka ne. Ya nuna cewa ya samu ra'ayoyi sama da miliyan 42.

claim: Tun bayan kididdigar shekarar 2020, Florida ta "tashi daga rinjaye na 'yan Democrat zuwa rinjaye na 'yan Republican miliyan 1.5".
evidence: Kwana daya kafin 'yan majalisa na jihar su taru don ganawa a wani zaman na musamman kan sake zagayowar, Gwamnan Florida na Republican Ron DeSantis ya bayyana taswirarsa na majalisa na jihar da ya gabatar, wanda zai iya sa 'yan Republican su yi murabus da kujeru hudu da 'yan Democrat ke rikewa. DeSantis ya raba taswirar a ranar 27 ga Afrilu tare da Fox News kafin ya aika ta ga majalisar dokokin jihar. Ya ce sabon taswirar  wanda yawanci za a zana a kowace shekara 10 bayan an yi rajista  zai wakilci masu jefa kuri'ar Florida a hanya mai kyau. "Florida ta yi takaice a cikin rajistar shekarar 2020, kuma mun yi gwagwarmaya don wakilci mai kyau tun daga lokacin", DeSantis ya ce Fox News, yana magana ne game da karancin yawan yawan mutane a jihar a wannan shekarar. "Mutanenmu sun karu sosai, kuma mun koma daga rinjayen 'yan Democrat zuwa miliyan 1.5".

claim: "A karkashin Dokar Raba Kudaden shiga ta 2025, mun ba da KSh415 biliyan ga yankuna, wanda ya kai kusan KSh30 biliyan fiye da na bara".
evidence: Amma shugaban kasar ya yi ta wuce gona da iri kan yawan mutanen da suka yi rajista a eCitizen, dandamali na ayyukan dijital na gwamnati, kuma wasu ba su iya tabbatar da ikirarinsa game da biliyoyin da aka tara ta hanyarsa ba. Shugaban majalisar gwamnoni Ahmed Abdullahi ya yi daidai cewa kudaden da aka ba da na gundumar sun kai tsakanin 10 da 13% na kasafin kudin kasar. A watan Agusta na shekarar 2025, shugaban kasar William Ruto ya shiga cikin gwamnonin Kenya 47 a gundumar Homa Bay, kimanin kilomita 400 kudu maso yammacin Nairobi, don taron sadaukar da kai na shekara-shekara . A shekara ta 12, wasu sun soki dandalin a matsayin " ɓata lokaci da kuma albarkatun ƙasa " amma sau da yawa ana ganin shi a matsayin mabuɗin hanyar da aka tura wa tsarin dijital, yanzu muna ba da tabbacin ci gaban da gwamnatin ta samu, kuma Rightocom ta aika miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga gundumar ta 2010, inda ta tura miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga tsarin sadaukar da kai, yanzu muna ganin ta hanyar da ake amfani da shi na dijital, da kuma Rightocom ta tura miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga gwamnatocin kasar.

claim: Wani fari da ya faru a kwanan nan a Spain ya gano wani abin tunawa mai shekaru 7,000 da haihuwa, wanda ya fi tsohuwar pyramids na Masar.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Gaskiya ne cewa wani abin tunawa mai girma wanda ya kai shekaru dubu bakwai ya bayyana a lokacin da fari ya sauko da matakin tankin Valdecañas a cikin yankin Extremadura na Spain. A cikin 'yan shekarun nan, abin tunawa ya bayyana gaba ɗaya a cikin 2019 da 2022 ... ... duk da haka, tankin ya cika a cikin 2025  lokacin da aka sake raba posts game da abin tunawa  kuma abin tunawa bai bayyana ba. Wani abin tunawa mai girma wanda ya fi tsofaffin pyramids na Masar da Stonehenge na Ingila kwanan nan ya fito daga ruwan Spain yayin da fari ya mamaye ƙasar, bisa ga jita-jita da ta bazu a watan Yuli 2025. Alal misali, a ranar 14 ga Yuli, 2025, wani matsayi a Facebook ya buga hoto na abin tunawa da ake tsammani tare da dogon bayani (archive): Hoton ya nuna wani ra'ayi na iska na wani dutse mai zagaye kusa da gefen ruwa na kwanan nan.

claim: Shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya kira gwamnan California Gavin Newsom "shugaban Amurka, Gavin Newscum".
evidence: A ranar 16 ga Maris, 2026, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya gudanar da taron manema labarai inda ya zargi gwamnan California Gavin Newsom, wanda ya dade yana sukar shugaban kasa. A cewar shirye-shirye da kuma maganganun da ake zargin an dauka daga taron manema labarai na Trump, ya yi magana da Newsom a matsayin "shugaban Amurka, Gavin Newscum". Wani mai amfani da X ya rubuta game da zargin da Trump ya yi: "Yana samun abin mamaki! Yana rasa shi da sauri fiye da yadda duk wani daga cikinmu ya yi tunanin zai yi". A cikin wani sakon da aka sanya a shafin Watch ya ce: Shugaban Amurka na yanzu yana zaune a bayan Residence Watch, wanda Trump ya danganta da shi, da kuma shugaban Amurka, da kuma mataimakin shugaban kasa na California Newscum, saboda haka, ya yi magana da shugaban Amurka a matsayin "mai kallo" a gabansa.

claim: Dried kwakwa iya warkar da baki ulcers
evidence: Ko da yake yawancin cututtukan baki na iya warkewa da kansu, ana ba da shawarar cewa maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin cututtukan baki ne, amma ana ba da shawarar cewa maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin maganin cututtukan baki ne don sauƙaƙe bayyanar cututtukan baki. Babban cututtukan da suka fi girma, masu ci gaba, da kuma na sake dawowa suna buƙatar takamaiman magani tare da manufar sauƙaƙe alamun, rage tsawon lokacin cututtukan, da haɓaka lafiyar mai haƙuri gaba ɗaya. Saboda haka, kada a ɗauki kokwamba mai bushewa a matsayin ingantaccen magani don maganin cututtukan baki. Quick Take An Instagram post ya nuna cewa cin naman kaza mai bushewa na iya taimakawa wajen warkar da cututtukan baki. Bayan nazarin da'awar, mun gano cewa ba daidai ba ne. A cewar da'awar d_tuber Instagram reel, cin abinci mai bushewa don cin abinci mai kyau na gaba ɗaya.

claim: Yawan mutanen birane a Najeriya a lokacin samun 'yancin kai ya kai kusan miliyan 7.
evidence: A shekarar 1960, an baiwa Najeriya 'yancin yin siyasa a matsayin kasa mai mulkin mallaka a karkashin kundin tsarin mulkin ta 1960, wanda ya tanadar da tsarin mulki na majalisa, yankuna 3 (Yankin Arewa, Gabas da Yamma), tsarin mulki na majalisa biyu a majalisar tarayya (Senate da House of Representatives) da kuma matakan yanki (House of Assembly da House of Chiefs) tare da ikon yin mulki na gwamnati a cikin rukuni uku ko jerin  na musamman, na lokaci guda da kuma na ragowa. An nada Dr. Nnamdi Azikiwe a matsayin Gwamna Janar na tarayya kuma Tafawa Balewa ya ci gaba da zama shugaban majalisa mai zaɓaɓɓen tsarin mulki, amma yanzu mai mulkin mallaka. Tun 1960, Najeriya ta kasance ƙasa mai cikakken 'yanci kuma tana da 'yan' yan'uwa maza da mata. Tun daga lokacin da Buhari ya zama shugaban kasa, Muhammadu Buhari ne shugaban kasar Najeriya, kuma a halin yanzu shi ne shugaban kasa na biyar.

claim: Walgreens ta fara sayar da katunan Hallmark Mahogany, wata alama ce ta katunan gaisuwa musamman ga baƙar fata a watan Agusta ko kuma a kusa da hakan.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Walgreens ta adana kayayyakin daga alamar Hallmark Mahogany a shafin yanar gizon ta, tare da zaɓuɓɓukan karɓar samfuran a cikin shagon, a lokacin wannan rubutun. Hallmark ya ce a shafin yanar gizon ta cewa alamar Mahogany ita ce "saƙon tayin katin da ke akwai ga masu amfani da Afirka na Amurka". Ko da yake Hallmark ya tsara katunan alamar ta Mahogany zuwa ga masu amfani da Afirka na Amurka, ba mu sami wata hujja cewa kamfanin ya hana wasu masu amfani siyan su ba. Ba a bayyana a lokacin wannan rubutun ba lokacin da Walgreens ta fara adana katunan alama ta Mahogany. A cikin binciken da aka yi a kan layi a watan Agusta 2025 an ce Walgreens ya "fara" sayar da katunan. Hallmark ya kafa alamar a 1991, a cewar shafin yanar gizon sa. A watan Agusta 2025, wani bincike ya yi a kan layi cewa Walgreens ya fara sayar da katunan gaisuwa ne kawai ga mutanen da ke da yankin Blackmark Mahogany.

claim: Fake: Ukraine ta yi kokarin cin hanci da rashawa ga Cibiyar Nazarin Yaƙi
evidence: An samar da bidiyon da ke yawo a yanar gizo ta hanyar amfani da fasaha ta wucin gadi bisa ga wani bidiyo na ainihi daga Cibiyar Nazarin Yaƙi (ISW), sanannen tushen bayani game da yadda yakin ya gudana a Ukraine da kuma duniya.Sources masu goyon bayan Rasha da yawa sun yada wani bidiyo da ake zargin Cibiyar Nazarin Yaƙi ta ƙirƙira game da wani yunƙurin cin hanci da rashawa wanda ma'aikatan cibiyar suka yi zargin sun haɗu da shi.An ce wasu 'yan Ukraine da ba a san sunayensu ba sun tuntuɓi wallafe-wallafen a madadin kafofin watsa labarai na duniya masu inganci kuma sun ba da cin hanci na dala 100,000 zuwa dala 500,000 don wallafa ƙarya game da Pokrovsk.

evidence: Yanayin da ake ciki ya ɓace a cikin shafukan yanar gizo da ke da'awar cewa ana kashe kuɗin bikin LGBTQ+ a Burtaniya bayan sabon shugaban majalisar.Ian Cooper, wanda ke jagorantar Majalisar Staffordshire County bayan da Reform UK ta ci nasara a kan majalisar a zaben Mayu, ya buɗe sabon shafin, ya ce ya ƙi yin amfani da kuɗin jama'a don taimakawa wajen tallafawa taron Pride.Were not against Pride, Cooper ya ce a wata hira da aka yi da shi a ranar 3 ga Yuni, ya buɗe sabon shafin tare da ITV Central. Ku yi nishaɗi mai ban sha'awa, ku yi nishaɗi mai ban sha'awa, ku yi farin ciki. Duk da haka, ba za mu kashe kuɗin masu biyan haraji ba. Idan kuna son yin hakan, babban abu, ku je ga masu zaman kansu, ku nemi sadaka, ku saka hannunku a aljihunku.ReideA Facebook post, yana buɗe sabbin kwanaki daga baya, yana nufin tabs, Cooper ya ba da wata sanarwa cewa: Prosecutors, wanda aka shirya a cikin wani sabon taron da aka shirya a cikin 2024, ya ce ba a taɓa samun kuɗin shiga ba.

claim: Wani fasinja, duk da cewa an sanar da shi cewa babu wani wuri a lokacin da yake kokarin yin ajiyar gado a kan layi a cikin dakin ritaya a tashar jirgin kasa ta Guruvayur a Kerala, ya ga ɗakin kwana ya zama cikakke lokacin da ya je wurin.
evidence: A cewar masu amfani, wani fasinja, duk da cewa an sanar da shi babu wani wuri a lokacin da yake kokarin yin rajistar gado ta yanar gizo, ya ga ɗakin kwana ya zama cikakke a lokacin da ya je wurin, yana haifar da shakku game da zamba. X Post @ByRakeshSimha Ana iya ganin hanyar haɗi na da'awar a nan. Har ila yau, Karanta:Operation Sindoor: Air Chief Marshal Consoles Family Of 'Missing' IAF Pilot Shivangi? claim: Jermaine Thomas, dan wani tsohon soja na sojojin Amurka da aka haifa a sansanin soja a Jamus, an kore shi zuwa Jamaica.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Wani alkalin shige da fice ya umarci a kore Jermaine Thomas daga Amurka a watan Disamba na shekarar 2013, a cewar hukumar Shige da Fice da Yarda da Yarda da Yarda. Ma'aikatar Tsaro ta Kasa ta kuma shaida wa Snopes cewa Thomas "ya samu umarnin karshe na cire shi. " An cire Thomas kuma aka aika shi zuwa Jamaica a watan Mayu na shekarar 2025. A karshen watan Yuni na shekarar 2025, a lokacin da gwamnatin Trump ta yi kokarin cire 'yan gudun hijira da ke zaune a Amurka a hanyar da ta sabawa doka, a shafukan sada zumunta na sada zumunta an bayyana cewa an kore dan wani soja na Amurka daga kasar Jamaica, duk da cewa bai taba zuwa kasar ba. Mutumin, wanda aka sani da Jermaine Thomas, an haife shi ne a wani sansanin sojin Amurka a Jamus, a cewar sakonnin. Jermaine Thomas, dan wani soja na Amurka, an kore shi zuwa Jamaica  a kasar da ya zauna  a kasarsa  a shekarar 1986, kuma mahaifinsa ya kasance dan kasar Jamus. claim: A watan Agusta na shekarar 2025, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya rattaba hannu kan wani umarni da ya sa ƙona tutar Amurka ta zama hukuncin shekara guda a kurkuku.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar A ranar 25 ga Agusta, 2025, Trump ya sanya hannu kan umarnin da aka ba da taken "Tarabatarwa da kona tutar Amurka". Wannan umarnin na nufin gurfanar da duk wanda aka kama yana kona tutar Amurka, a duk lokacin da zai yiwu, gami da dakatar da kuma soke biza ga ba 'yan Amurkawa. A cikin 1989, Kotun Koli ta Amurka ta bayyana a cikin Texas v. Johnson cewa ƙona tutar Amurka 'yancin magana ne da aka kare ta Dokar Kwaskwarima ta Farko. A ranar 25 ga Agusta, 2025, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya rubuta wani umarni na Trump wanda ya sa hannu a kan "Tarabatarwa da aka yi a kan manyan labarai na Amurka", wanda ya bayyana cewa "Lokacin da ya sabawa Trump ya yi watsi da umarnin, ya bayyana cewa ya yi watsi da umarnin.

claim: Gidaje suna da tsada domin mun mamaye kasar da 'yan gudun hijira miliyan 30  kuma saboda karancin gidaje.
evidence: "Saboda mun yi mamaye kasar da 'yan gudun hijira miliyan 30 da suka dauki gidaje da ya kamata su tafi ga 'yan kasar Amurka", in ji Vance a Fox News da Sean Hannity a ranar 13 ga Nuwamba. "Kuma a lokaci guda ba mu gina isassun sababbin gidaje da za mu fara da su ba ko da ga yawan mutanen da muke da su". Yawan masu gudun hijira a Amurka ba bisa ka'ida ba ya kai rabin hakan ne, wanda ƙididdigar  ta nuna cewa mutane miliyan 12 zuwa 14 ne daga shekarar 2023, sabon bayanan da ke akwai. Kuma ko da yake masana sun yarda cewa karuwar yawan masu gudun hijira na haifar da karuwar bukatar gidaje, babu wata hujja da ta nuna cewa akwai babban dalili da ya sa ake bukatar karin gidaje.

claim: An haramta koyar da kiɗa a Hamburg Jamus saboda Musulmai sun ce haram ne.
evidence: Ba gaskiya ba ne: Makarantun gwamnati na Hamburg ba su yi irin wannan abu ba. An yi watsi da wani rahoto na labarai na harshen Jamusanci a shafukan sada zumunta. Rahoton ya biyo bayan sanya hannu kan wata sanarwa ta hadin gwiwa daga wakilan addini da jami'an makaranta game da rashin haƙuri da warewa - wani mataki da wasu abubuwan da suka faru na cin zarafin addini suka jawo. Bidiyon bidiyo na dakika 33 ya bayyana a cikin wani rubutu (wanda aka adana a nan) da @realMaalouf ya wallafa a shafin X a ranar 29 ga Satumba, 2025.

claim: A tsakiyar watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya sanar da wasannin Patriot Games, gasar wasanni ta kwanaki hudu tsakanin matasa maza da mata daga dukkan jihohi da yankunan Amurka.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa A tsakiyar watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, wani ikirarin (da aka ajiye) ya yada a yanar gizo cewa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya sanar da "Patriot Games", gasar wasanni ta kwanaki hudu tsakanin matasa maza da mata daga dukkan jihohi da yankuna na Amurka. Mai amfani da One X, wanda a lokacin da aka rubuta wannan labarin ya samu kusan ra'ayoyi miliyan 30, ya ba da labarin kuma ya rubuta: "Trump ya sanar da 'abubuwan da ba a taɓa gani ba na kwanaki hudu na wasanni' tare da 'matashi daya da matashi daya daga kowace jiha da yanki.'" Wannan ikirarin ya kuma yada a Facebook (da aka ajiye), Instagram (da aka ajiye), Threads (da aka ajiye), Snopes (da aka ajiye) da Reddit (da aka ajiye), yayin da masu karatu na Snopes suka tuntube mu don tambayar mu ko sanarwar ta kasance ta gaske kuma ko taron zai ci gaba kamar yadda aka yi.

claim: A lokacin taron majalisar dattijai a fadar White House a watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, an rubuta sunan Sakataren tsaron Amurka Pete Hegseth ba daidai ba a kan takardar sa na "Sakataren yaki".
evidence: A ranar 2 ga watan Disamba, 2025, a lokacin taron karshe na majalisar White House na shekara, masu kallo da suke da idanu masu ban tsoro sun lura da abin da ya bayyana a matsayin kuskuren rubutu mai ban mamaki a kan ɗayan allon. Bisa ga hotuna da hotunan allo da aka raba game da taron, an rubuta sunan Sakataren Tsaro na Amurka Pete Hegseth ba daidai ba a kan allon sa, yana karanta "Sakataren Yaƙi". Masu karanta Snopes sun raba hoto na Hegseth zaune a bayan allon da ake ganin ba daidai ba kuma sun nemi mu tabbatar da ko kuskuren gaskiya ne. Wasu masu karatu sun ba da shawarar cewa "SS" yana "ba Nazi Images. " Gwamnatin Tarayyar California Democratic.

claim: Hukumar NIA ta kaddamar da layin taimako don mutane su ba da rahoton ayyukan 'tsayayya da ƙasa' kamar su jihadi na soyayya da ta'addanci a Indiya.
evidence: An wallafa wani sakon da ke nuna cewa Hukumar Bincike ta Kasa (NIA) ta kaddamar da layin tuntuɓar Musulmi da ake zargin suna yin ayyukan da "sakan sabawa da bukatun kasar", ciki har da abin da ake kira jihadi na soyayya, da makircin ta'addanci, da kuma gina haikalin, a shafukan sada zumunta.

claim: "Fitar da cinikin Najeriya ya karu da kashi 44.3% a Q2 2025 zuwa N7.46 tiriliyan ($4.74 biliyan) ..."
evidence: Shugaban ya yi amfani da lambobin da ya bayar, ciki har da cewa farashin kuɗi ya kai ƙarancin shekaru uku a watan Agusta 2025, ajiyar waje ta kasance a mafi girma tun daga 2019 kuma an ba da N330 biliyan ga gidaje miliyan 8 a ƙarƙashin Shirin Gudanar da Zuba Jari na Kasa. Duk da haka, wasu da'awar sun kasance masu yaudarar, kamar kwatanta ƙimar GDP ta kwata-kwata da lambobin shekara-shekara da kuma daidaita fitar da fitar da ba mai ba tare da man fetur ba da duk fitar da kayan ƙasa ba. Babban da'awar Tinubu ba daidai ba ita ce cewa gwamnatinsa ta yanke ma'aunin sabis na Najeriya na samun kuɗi zuwa bashin kuɗi daga kashi 97% zuwa ƙasa da 50%. Ba mu sami hujja ba ga da'awarsa cewa ma'aikata 153,000 sun amfana daga shirin rance na N30 biliyan.

claim: Kimanin kashi 3 cikin 100 na Amurkawa ne ke aiki a aikin noma.
evidence: Da'awar: Kimanin kashi 3 cikin 100 na Amurkawa suna cikin aikin noma Source: Eric Edem Agbana, MP Ketu North Fasali: Overstated Researched by Gifty Danso Dan majalisar wakilai na Ketu North, Eric Edem Agbana, yana magana a shirin Metro TV na Good Morning Ghana a ranar 3 ga Yuli, 2025, ya ce kusan kashi 3 cikin 100 na Amurkawa suna cikin aikin noma. Sanarwar ta kasance ne sakamakon tattaunawa game da shirin Plus na awanni 24 da aka ƙaddamar kwanan nan, wanda gwamnatin Ghana ta nuna zai canza aikin noma da fitarwa. "Idan ka je ƙasashen da suka ci gaba kamar Amurka, kusan kashi 3 cikin 100 na al'ummarsu suna cikin aikin noma. Amma suna samar da isasshen kayayyaki, kuma yawan su ya bambanta. "Amma idan ka zo yankinmu na ƙasar, kana da mutane da yawa a aikin noma kuma duk da haka muna samar da abin da ba a ... saboda har yanzu a tsakanin manoma akwai 1:57 da 1:71 ba, kuma ya ce a duk shekara da ya yi ruwa da kuma ba a samar da tallafi ba.

claim: Mun ba da dala miliyan 60 makonni biyu da suka gabata don taimakon abinci ga Gaza.
evidence: Da aka yi masa tambayoyi game da yunwa da ke yaduwa a Gaza, Shugaba Donald Trump ya ce kwanan nan Amurka ta aika da miliyoyin taimako. "Ka sani, mun ba da dala miliyan 60 makonni biyu da suka gabata kuma ba wanda ya ma yarda da shi, don abinci", ya ce a ranar 27 ga Yuli a Turnberry, Scotland. Trump ya maimaita da'awar a ranar 29 ga Yuli, yana cewa "Mun aika da dala miliyan 60. Wannan babban adadin kuɗi ne don abinci, kuɗi mai yawa. Wannan zai iya kula da mutane na dogon lokaci, kuma muna so mu tabbata cewa za a yi  ana kashe shi yadda ya kamata". Ma'aikatar Harkokin Wajen Amurka ta ce a wata sanarwar da aka ba da sanarwar ta bayar a ranar 2 ga Yuli cewa ta amince da kyautar dala miliyan 30 a watan Yuni don shirin taimakon Gaza da Amurka da Isra'ila ke tallafawa; daga bisani ma'aikatar ta ce cewa daga ranar 26 ga Yuli, ba a ba da kuɗin ba.

claim: Shafin mujallar Frontline ya yi hasashen cewa za a yi tashin hankalin Vijay Wave a Tamil Nadu kafin a yi zabe.
evidence: An yi hasashen cewa an yi amfani da hoton da aka yi wa Frontline na yin hasashen "zafin Vijay" a Tamil Nadu kafin a yi zabe a jihar ne. An yi hasashen cewa an yi amfani da hoton da aka yi wa 'yan wasan kwaikwayo da suka zama 'yan siyasa, C. Joseph Vijay, wanda ya kafa Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), a matsayin babban mai neman zabe a zaben majalisar dokokin da ake gudanarwa. Tare da Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) mai mulki da kuma babbar 'yan adawa All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK), TVK ita ce sabuwar mai shiga cikin wannan gwagwarmayar a wannan zaben. An shirya zaben a ranar 23 ga Afrilu, inda aka shirya za a yi lissafin a ranar 4 ga Mayu.

claim: Babban Ministan West Bengal Mamata Banerjee ta yi rashin girmamawa ga waƙar kasa kuma ta bar mataki kafin waƙar ta ƙare.

Wani X handle "@pmreddy21" ya raba bidiyon a ranar 7 ga Nuwamba, 2025, yana cewa, "Ga wani clip wow @MamataOfficial ya yi rashin mutunci ga waka ta kasa". Ana iya ganin wani archived link na post nan.

claim: Tabbatar da Gaskiya: Babban mahallin da ya ɓace daga da'awar 1% na Burtaniya sun goyi bayan halatta zubar da ciki har zuwa haihuwa
evidence: 'Yan majalisa na Birtaniya sun kada kuri'ar rage laifin zubar da ciki ga mata, ba su halatta shi ba, sabanin rubutun da ke kan layi da ke cewa sun goyi bayan halatta shi har zuwa haihuwar, ko da yake kashi 1 cikin 100 na yawan mutanen Burtaniya ne kawai ke goyon bayan irin wannan manufar.An wallafa wannan ikirarin ne bayan 'yan majalisa na Burtaniya sun kada kuri'ar su na son sake fasalin dokar zubar da ciki a ranar 17 ga Yuni.Binciken YouGov ya nuna cewa kashi 1 cikin 100 na 'yan Burtaniya ne kawai ke ganin ya kamata a halatta zubar da ciki har zuwa haihuwar amma 'yan majalisa da suka yi kuri'a da yawa su yi daidai da hakan, ya ce wani sakon da aka wallafa a ranar 18 ga Yuni, ya buɗe sabon shafin a Facebook.

claim: A Minnesota, an ba masu mallakar bindiga lasisi damar ɗaukar bindiga mai ɗorawa a lokacin zanga-zanga.
evidence: Bayan da aka harbe Alex Pretti mai shekara 37 da aka kashe shi da hannun jami'an tsaron kan iyakoki na Amurka a ranar 24 ga Janairu, 2026, a Minneapolis, wasu 'yan gwamnatin Shugaba Donald Trump sun zana Pretti a matsayin mai tayar da hankali saboda yana dauke da bindiga mai dauke da kaya yayin zanga-zangar. A wani fitowar da aka yi a ranar 25 ga Janairu a Fox News, dangane da mutuwar Pretti, darektan FBI Kash Patel ya ce (a karfe 5:10), "Ba za ku iya kawo makami mai dauke da kaya mai dauke da makamai masu dauke da mujallu da dama ba ga duk wani zanga-zanga da kuke so. Abu ne mai sauki. Ba ku da 'yancin karya doka da kuma tayar da tashin hankali". A sakamakon haka, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta da yawa sun yi ta tambayar Patel ko kuma suka yi musu adawa da su, ciki har da kungiyar masu mallakar makamai ta Minnesota, kungiyar kare hakkin bindiga ta Minnesota, wadda Patel ta "harkarar da bindiga" a kan dokar Trump.

claim: Gwamnatin ta kaddamar da kamfen na bayar da gudummawa don tarawa dalar Amurka miliyan 8 don taimakawa Nimisha Priya.
evidence: Gwamnatin Indiya ba ta nemi wani tallafi ba don taimakawa Nimsha Priya, kuma ba ta raba wani asusun banki da aka ba da izini ba don wannan. Sakamakon da aka yi a shafukan sada zumunta da wannan ikirarin ya karya ne. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Bayan an dage hukuncin kisa ga ma'aikaciyar jinya ta Indiya Nimisha Priya a kan kisan da aka yi wa dan kasar Yemen Talal Abdo, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta na raba wani bayanan bayanai da kuma neman tallafi a karkashin yakin 'Save Nimisha Priya'. Ana ikirarin cewa domin ceton Nimisha Priya, za a iya canja wurin adadin tallafin kai tsaye zuwa asusun da aka ba da izini na Gwamnatin Indiya. Ana neman a tara Rs 8.3 crore ta wannan da'awar. Vishvas News, a cikin yakin da aka yi, ta gano cewa wannan da'awar ta karya ce. Gwamnatin Indiya ba ta ba da wani tallafi don gudanar da bincike na Nimsha Priya da aka raba da wani mai amfani, kuma ba ta ba da izinin gudanar da wani tallafi na karya ba.

claim: Sunil Gavaskar ya ce "Virat Kohli ya horar da Anushka [Sharma] ne kawai a lokacin kulle kulle"

claim: Masanin kimiyya kuma malami Carl Sagan ya taɓa cewa, "Magungunan hujja mai rikici hujja ce mafi kyau, ba a kawar da ra'ayoyi ba".
evidence: A cikin wani rubutu mai taken "Real Patriots Ask Questions", wanda Sagan ya rubuta tare da Ann Druyan, gwauruwarsa kuma mai ba da labari mai yawa. Saboda yanayin haɗin gwiwar da Sagan da Druyan suka yi, ba zai yiwu a gano marubucin labarin ba. Shekaru da yawa, masu amfani da intanet sun raba wani bayani game da yadda za a magance mugun hujjoji, suna ba da shi ga masanin kimiyya da ilimi Carl Sagan, wanda ya mutu a 1996.

claim: Mawaki Josh Groban ya yi wa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump magana game da tambayar wata ƙungiyar waƙa ta buga sanannen waƙar "You Raise Me Up".
evidence: Game da wannan ƙididdigar Wani jita-jita da aka yada a kan layi a watan Nuwamba na 2025 ya ce mawaƙa da mawallafin mawaƙa Josh Groban ya fuskanci shugaban Amurka Donald Trump saboda ya nemi ƙungiyar su yi waƙar sanannen "You Raise Me Up". Groban ya yi sanannen yaɗa waƙa a 2003. The Irish-Norwegian band Secret Garden da farko ya rubuta kuma ya yi "You Raise Me Up" a 2001. A matsayin misali na jita-jita, a ranar 1 ga Nuwamba, wani mai amfani da ke kula da shafin Facebook na Graceful Melodies (da aka adana) ya buga hoto wanda ya nuna hoto na Groban kusa da hoto na Trump. Rubutun ya fara, "Lokacin da Donald Troban ya nuna wa ƙungiyar kuma ya ce, 'Play You Raise Me Up,'  An riga an shirya Groban. A wani wuri, Josh yana kallon live, kuma a wannan lokacin, bai kasance a shiru ba.

claim: Babban jami'in jiragen sama, Air Marshal AP Singh, ya yi magana game da gargadi ga gwamnatin tarayya game da jirgin saman Tejas kuma ya ce za a tura matukan jirgin sama na IAF zuwa Pakistan don horarwa.
evidence: A cikin bidiyon kuma Singh ya kwatanta jirgin saman Tejas, jirgin saman India na 'yan asalin kasar LCA, da wani abincin Indiya mai suna samosa saboda siffarsa. BOOM ta gano cewa an yi amfani da bidiyon ta hanyar amfani da fasahar AI. Bidiyon da kuma wata sanarwa ta karya ta Singh inda ya yaba da rundunar sojin saman Pakistan (PAF) sun bayyana bayan jirgin saman saman saman saman saman saman Pakistan ya fadi a Dubai Air Show a ranar 21 ga Nuwamba, 2025. An kashe kwamandan Wing Namansh Syal a cikin hatsarin. Claim 1: Bidiyon IAF yana kwatanta Tejas samosa da samosa 2: Alamar da aka raba tare da rubutun da ke fassara zuwa, "Shugaban Air Force na Pakistan ya ce a nan ne za a aika da wani fayil na horo don 'PIAF' da kansa don ganin 'PIAF' ya ce a nan ne, kuma a nan ne shugaban jirgin saman Pakistan ya ce 'PIAF' ya aika da wani fayil na jirgin sama don 'PIAF' ya duba 'PIAF' don 'PIAF' ya ce a nan.

claim: Yawan 'yan sanda ya ragu lokacin da shugaban jam'iyyar National Party Judith Collins ya zama ministan 'yan sanda.
evidence: Bayanan 'yan sanda na NZ sun nuna cewa jami'an sun karu zuwa 8,643 a watan Yuni na shekara ta 2009 da 8,707 a watan Yuni na shekara ta 2010, kafin su ragu zuwa 8,638 a watan Yuni na shekara ta 2011.

claim: Sarkin Bengal Tiger yana tafiya a cikin gandun daji na Mankar na Gabashin Burdwan
evidence: Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa bidiyon da ke nuna cewa wani Sarki na Bengal ne yake tafiya a cikin gandun daji na Mankar a Gabashin Burdwan. Ana rarraba bidiyon a shafukan sada zumunta. Ana raba wannan bidiyon ne a matsayin wani sabon gani daga West Bengal. Tabbatar da cewa bidiyon ya nuna shekaru da yawa da suka gabata kuma an fara rikodin shi ne a Andhra Pradesh. Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa bidiyon da ke nuna cewa: Mankar Jungle Tiger Saw Mill English: Tiger spotted in Mankar Forest Za ka iya bincika wannan sakon a nan. NM VERIFIED NewsMobile ya duba bidiyon da ke nuna cewa abin da ya faru ba gaskiya ba ne. An bincika hotunan allo daga bidiyon da ya faru da gaske ta amfani da Lens na Google. Binciken ya kai ga wannan bidiyon da aka wallafa a shafin Facebook Kurnool Diaries a ranar 8 ga Nuwamba, 2020. Wannan ya tabbatar da cewa footage ya kasance aƙalla shekaru biyar da haihuwa kuma ba daga Mankar ba.

evidence: A ranar Talata, an wallafa wani bidiyo da ya nuna mai bishara kuma wanda ya kafa Global Peace Initiative, Dokta KA Paul, inda za a iya jinsa yana cewa hukumomin Yemen sun soke hukuncin kisa na Nurse Nimisha Priya a Kerala, ana kuma yada shi a shafukan sada zumunta. "Ina so in gode wa dukan shugabannin da suka taimaka wajen yin wannan babban nasara. An soke mutuwar Nimisha Priya. Da yardar Allah, za a sake ta kuma a kai ta Indiya. Ina so in gode wa Firayim Minista Modi ji don shirya don aika da diflomasiyatanku ... kuma a kai su cikin sana'a, lafiya", in ji Dr Paul a cikin bidiyon yana cewa. Wannan bidiyon a Turanci ne Dr. Paul ya rubuta a kan hukuncinsa na X. Duk da haka, yana da muhimmanci a lura cewa a wani lokaci a bidiyon bai gabatar da wani takaddun hukuma na Yemen da ya tabbatar da sokewar mutuwar Nimisha Priya ba. Ana iya ganin wani rahoto na hukuma na gidan yari na kasar Yemen da aka yi wa Nimisha Priya a watan Yuli 2017 da aka wallafa cewa, ana kashe wani dan kasar Yemen mai suna Nim Nim Nim Nim Nimsa Mahdi

claim: 'Yan sanda a West Bengal suna jefa duwatsu bayan sun kasa dakatar da wata babbar motar da ke dauke da yashi da duwatsu.
evidence: Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa wani bidiyo da ke nuna 'yan sanda suna jefa duwatsu a kan manyan motocin sufuri da ke motsi kwanan nan ya zama sananne a shafukan sada zumunta. A cikin hotunan, ana ganin ana jefa duwatsu a kan ɗakunan manyan motocin da ke ci gaba da motsawa ba tare da tsayawa ba. Ana rarraba bidiyon tare da ikirarin cewa ya nuna 'yan sanda na West Bengal suna jefa duwatsu bayan sun kasa dakatar da wani kaya mai yashi da duwatsu. Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa sakon da ke da ke da sananne: #West Bengal - 'yan sanda na West Bengal suna jefa duwatsu a kan manyan motocin dutse ... #West Bengal - 'yan sanda ba su iya dakatar da manyan motocin dutse ba suna bin duwatsu ... claim: Za a iya kashe Tetanus da peroxide kuma kawai a samu ta hanyar dabbobi
evidence: "Tetanus wataƙila ɗayan alluran rigakafi ne mafi ban dariya a duk lokacin", in ji rubutun a cikin hoto da aka raba a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 2025 a Instagram. claim: Shah Rukh Khan ya ce Mustafizur Rahman zai yi wasa a KKR duk da adawa da kuma sukar masana'antun Gautam Adani.
evidence: A cikin bidiyon da ke yawo a shafukan sada zumunta, an nuna wani bidiyon da ya nuna cewa dan wasan Bollywood da kuma dan wasan Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) Shah Rukh Khan suna kare dan wasan Bangladesh Mustafizur Rahman a KKR, yayin da suke sukar masana'antun Gautam Adani da kuma "siyasan Hindu-Musulunci". A cikin bidiyon, ana jin Shah Rukh Khan yana cewa masu sukar Mustafizur Rahman ya kamata su "daina yin ihu", yayin da suke zargin Adani da cin amanar Indiya ta hanyar samar da wutar lantarki ga Bangladesh, da kuma nace cewa Mustafizur zai "yi wasa da KKR". Ana raba bidiyon sosai tare da rubutun da ke nuna cewa sanarwa ce ta Shah Rukh Khan a cikin rikici game da cire Mustafizur Rahman daga KKR.

claim: An kashe Amirkawa da yawa a Chicago a cikin mako huɗu na Maris 2026 fiye da yadda aka kashe su a yaƙi tun lokacin da aka fara yakin Amurka da Isra'ila da Iran.
evidence: A karshen watan Maris na shekara ta 2026, wani jita-jita da aka yada a yanar gizo cewa an kashe fiye da Amurkawa a birnin Chicago a cikin makonni hudu kafin a fara yada ikirarin fiye da wadanda aka kashe a yakin Amurka da Isra'ila a kan Iran. Rikicin ya fara a karshen watan Fabrairu kuma yana cikin tsagaita wuta, kamar yadda a wannan rubuce-rubuce. Masu amfani da kafofin watsa labarun sun sanya ikirarin a kan X (da aka adana) da Facebook (da aka adana), ko da yake ya bayyana cewa ya fito ne daga mai suna "mai faɗin gaskiya mai gaskiya" Erick Eson. "Mai watsa labarai na Kirista" ya wallafa wani bidiyo a Instagram (da aka adana) a ranar 25 ga Maris, a lokacin da ya yi jayayya cewa kafofin watsa labarai sun yi ta fariya game da sojojin Amurka masu hatsari game da karshen yakin.

claim: An halicci snow globe na farko ta hanyar haɗari yayin da wani yake ƙoƙarin gina haske mai haske.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Erwin Perzy I, wani masanin kayan aikin tiyata a Vienna, ya yi gwaji tare da gilashin gilashin da aka cika da ruwa a kusa da 1900 don ƙara haske lokacin da aka ƙara ƙwayoyin ƙanƙara suka yi tafiya kamar dusar ƙanƙara. Tushen "snowfall" ya bayyana a matsayin haɗari, kuma daga baya ya juya ra'ayin zuwa duniyar tunawa. Baƙin da Perzy ba shine farkon sanannen misalin ra'ayi ba. Rahoton gwamnatin Amurka a kan baje kolin Paris na 1878 ya bayyana nauyin takarda da aka yi daga ƙwallan gilashin da aka cika da ruwa wanda ya haifar da tasirin snowstorm lokacin da aka juya.

claim: Jihar Ohio ta zartar da dokar da ta haramta saka kayan shafa, tufafi ko sassan jiki masu amfani da wucin gadi da ke nuna "dangi wanda ya bambanta da jinsi na mutum ko mai zane", wanda a zahiri ya hana nunawa a fili.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar majalisar wakilai ta Ohio ta amince da irin wannan doka ta hanyar kuri'a 6332. Harsunan da aka rubuta a cikin doka sun haramta nunawa a wuraren jama'a sai dai idan sun kasance na manya ne kawai, kamar wuraren yin sutura. Duk da haka ... Dokar ba ta wuce Majalisar Dattawa ta Ohio ba ko kuma Gwamnan Republican Mike DeWine ya sanya hannu a kan dokar ba, kamar yadda aka rubuta a wannan lokacin. jita-jita cewa jihar Ohio ta amince da dokar da ta haramta yin amfani da kayan shafa, tufafi, ko sassan jiki na wucin gadi don ba da shawarar "wani asalin jinsi wanda ya bambanta da jima'i na halitta na mai yin wasan kwaikwayo ko mai nishadi" da aka yada a kan layi a farkon watan Afrilu 2026.

claim: A watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya sanar da cewa an yi masa gwajin Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan a kwakwalwarsa "ba a samu kome ba".
evidence: A watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, wani jita-jita cewa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya sanar da yin MRI na kwakwalwarsa "ba ya sami komai" ya yi ta yawo a yanar gizo (da aka ajiye): WASHINGTONYana alfahari da lafiyarsa ta hankali, a ranar Litinin Donald J. Trump ya ce MRI da aka yi a kwakwalwarsa bai sami komai ba. "Na yi cikakken MRI", in ji shi ga 'yan jarida. "Mafi kyawun likitoci a kasar sun kalli kwakwalwata kuma sun fito. " Trump ya ce babu ma'ana a sakin MRI saboda "babu abin da za a gani", ya kara da cewa, "Yana kama da East Sean Wing".

claim: Amurka ta samu karin cinikin ice cream a shekarar 2020 a karkashin shugabancin Shugaba Trump, amma wannan karin ya juya ya zama asarar cinikin dala miliyan 40.6 a karkashin jagorancin Shugaba Biden.
evidence: Gwamnatin Shugaba Donald Trump ta yi wa tsohon shugaban Trump mai son ice cream Joe Biden murna, inda ya ce ya jagoranci masana'antar ice cream ta Amurka ta hanyar da ta shafi tattalin arziki. "Amurka ta samu karin cinikin ice cream a shekarar 2020 a karkashin jagorancin Shugaba Trump, amma wannan karin ya juya zuwa rashi na cinikin dala miliyan 40.6 a karkashin jagorancin Shugaba Biden", in ji Ofishin Wakilin Ciniki na Amurka a ranar 20 ga Yuli a ranar X. Wannan sakon ya hada da wani ginshiƙi da ya nuna asarar cinikin ice cream na Amurka da Japan, Afirka ta Kudu, Tarayyar Turai, Brazil, da Turkiyya.

claim: Vance Boelter, wanda ake zargi da harbi 'yan majalisa biyu na Minnesota na Democrat da matansu a watan Yuni na shekarar 2025 (mace guda ta mutu), Gwamnan Minnesota na Democrat Tim Walz ne ya taba nada shi a kwamitin ba da shawara.
evidence: Tun da yake tsohon Gwamnan Democrat Mark Dayton ne ya nada Boelter a matsayin shugaban hukumar a shekarar 2016 a baya, Walz ya sake nada shi a shekarar 2019 don wa'adi na biyu, wanda ya ƙare a watan Janairun 2023. An ruwaito cewa Boelter ba dan Democrat ba ne, kuma ofishin Walz ya tabbatar da cewa gwamnan ba ya ganawa da wadanda za a nada su kafin ya nada su. A tsakiyar watan Yuni na shekarar 2025, jita-jita ta fara yadawa cewa Vance Boelter, wanda ake zargi da harbi 'yan majalisar dokoki biyu na Democrat da matansu a ranar 14 ga Yuni, Gwamnan Democrat Tim Walz ne ya sake nada shi a matsayin memba na kwamitin ci gaban ma'aikatan Gwamna.

evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Wani jita-jita da aka yada a yanar gizo a watan Agusta na shekarar 2025 ya ce sakataren yada labarai na fadar White House Karoline Leavitt ta bayyana "gaskiya" game da jinsi na dan wasan WNBA Brittney Griner, wanda ke taka leda a Atlanta Dream. Masu amfani da ke raba batun sun kuma ce WNBA ta sanar da tilastawa " gwajin jima'i " don kakar wasan kwallon kwando ta gaba. Alal misali, a ranar 1 ga watan Agusta, wani mai amfani da ke kula da shafin Facebook na Yau a Amurka ya raba jita-jita a cikin wata sanarwa da ta samu sama da martani 69,000 da tsokaci 18,000 da kuma rabawa 3,600. claim: Gwamnatin Trump ta soke kudaden ba kawai ga Hukumar Kula da Yanayi ta Kasa ba, har ma da abin da ake kira NOAA.
evidence: Ruwa a Texas wanda ya kashe mutane sama da 100 ciki har da 'yan mata a sansanin bazara ya sake jawo hankalin mutane ga yanke aikin a hukumar tarayya da ta hada da Hukumar Kula da Yanayi ta Kasa. A wani sakon da aka wallafa a TikTok a ranar 6 ga watan Yuli ya ce Shugaba Donald Trump ya kashe kudaden Hukumar Kula da Yanayi ta Kasa da Yanayi. An cire TikTok bayan mun kaddamar da bincikenmu, amma mun gano cewa bidiyon da aka raba a kan X  da kuma ikirarin cewa an kashe kudaden da NOAA da hukumar kula da yanayin suka bayar an kuma raba shi a wasu dandamali. "Saboda Texans ba su san cewa babbar ambaliyar da ta kashe mutane sama da 20 za ta zo musu ba shi ne saboda gwamnatin Trump ta kashe kudaden ba kawai ga Hukumar Kula da Yanayi ta Kasa ba amma har da abin da ake kira NOAA ... duka waɗannan abubuwa ne yadda muke hasashen irin waɗannan abubuwan", mai ba da labari na bidiyon ya ce.

claim: Harin saman Amurka a kan tashar nukiliyar Fordow ta Iran
evidence: A lokacin rikicin Iran da Isra'ila, bidiyon da ke nuna cewa ya nuna harin da Amurka ta kai kan tashar nukiliyar Fordow ta Iran tana yadawa sosai a shafukan sada zumunta. Bidiyon ya nuna wani babban fashewa, yana cewa rundunar sojin sama ta Amurka ta kai hari a wurare uku na nukiliya a Iran a makon da ya gabata  Fordow, Natanz, da Isfahan. Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa sakon da ya yi yawo da taken cewa: "A daren jiya, bayan harin da Amurka ta kai, wani muhimmin tashar nukiliyar Iran da ake kira Fordor..!! scene scene (Ingilishi version: Last night, after the American airstrike, the scene at Iran's important nuclear facility, Fordow..!!) Za ka iya duba post din nan. FACT CHECK NewsMobile ya duba sakon da ya yi amfani da shi kuma ya gano cewa da'awar ba gaskiya ba ce.

claim: Tsohon shugaban Rasha Dmitry Medvedev ya ce a watan Yuni na shekarar 2025 cewa "ƙasashe da dama a shirye suke su ba Iran kai tsaye makaman nukiliya na kansu".
evidence: A ranar 22 ga watan Yuni, 2025, Amurka ta kai hari kan cibiyoyin nukiliya uku a Iran. A wannan ranar, wasu sakonni a shafukan sada zumunta da dama, ciki har da Reddit (da aka ajiye) da X (da aka ajiye)  sun yi ikirarin cewa tsohon shugaban Rasha Dmitry Medvedev ya wallafa a fili cewa, "Ƙararrun ƙasashe suna shirye su ba da kai tsaye ga Iran makaman nukiliya na kansu". Sakonni da dama a fili (da aka ajiye, da aka ajiye, da aka ajiye) sun samu miliyoyin ra'ayoyi. Babban sharhi ya nuna cewa wasu masu amfani sun yi imanin cewa da'awar ƙarya ce ko kuma cewa takamaiman da'awar ba ta bayyana a cikin asalin sakon Medvedev ba. Duk da shakku na waɗannan masu amfani, Medvedev  wanda ke aiki a matsayin mataimakin shugaban majalisar tsaro ta Rasha  ya bayyana a fili (da aka ajiye) cewa "ƙararrun ƙasashe suna shirye su ba da kai tsaye ga Iran makaman nukiliya na kansu".

claim: A cikin takardun da aka buga a cikin takarda da aka nuna a fili cewa Babban Lauyan Amurka Pam Bondi ya aika wa Daraktan FBI Kash Patel game da fayilolin Epstein a watan Fabrairun 2025.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Bayan wani rahoto na watan Yuli na shekarar 2025 daga Ma'aikatar Shari'a ta Amurka (DOJ) da FBI wanda ya ce mai aikata laifin jima'i Jeffrey Epstein bai ci gaba da "jerin abokan ciniki"  sabanin jita-jita da ake ci gaba  wasu masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta sun raba hotunan allo na wata wasika da ake zargin ta saba wa binciken da aka samu. Babban lauya na Amurka Pam Bondi ya aika da wasikar da aka ce ta ranar 27 ga Fabrairu, 2025, ga daraktan FBI Kash Patel, a cewar sakonnin da aka wallafa a shafukan sada zumunta. A cikin wasikar, Bondi "ya amince da karbar fayilolin Epstein da ke dauke da" jerin sunayen wadanda suka aikata laifin jima'i da kuma jerin sunayen wadanda suka azabtar da su", wani mai amfani da Facebook ne ya yi ikirarin cewa wasikar ta saba da binciken da aka yi. Masu binciken Snopes sun aiko mana da imel kuma sun tabbatar da cewa wasiƙar da aka rubuta zuwa Patel ta fito ne daga ranar 27 ga Fabrairu, 2025, kamar yadda aka ruwaito a fili.

claim: Elon Musk ya wallafa wani sako a kan X wanda ya ce, "Ba tare da ni ba, Trump zai yi rashin zaben, 'yan Democrat za su yi mulki a majalisar dokoki kuma 'yan Republican za su yi nasara 51-49 a majalisar dattijai".
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar A yayin tashin hankali tsakanin shugaban Amurka Donald Trump da mai arzikin fasaha Elon Musk, tsohon ma'aikacin gwamnati na musamman, da aka sanya a kan X a ranar 5 ga Yuni, 2025, ya yi ikirarin nuna hotunan allo daga asusun hukuma na Musk inda ya dauki bashi don sake zabar Trump na 2024. "Ba tare da ni ba, Trump zai yi rashin zaben, Dems za su yi iko da majalisar dokoki kuma Republicans za su kasance 51-49 a Majalisar Dattawa", Musk ya rubuta a cikin sakon. Wani sigar da aka raba ta @PopBase (da aka ajiye) ya sami ra'ayoyi sama da miliyan 2.1 da kuma hannun jari 5,000. Elon Musk zai yi rashin zaben ba tare da shi ba:"Ba tare da ni ba, Trump zai yi rashin zaben, Dems za su yi nasara da majalisar dokoki da Republicans za su kasance 51-49 a Majalisar Dattawa. [...] Irin wannan rashin godiya" pict.com.VGw/FYM@gmail.com ya gano cewa, mai amfani da asusun yanar gizo na @PopBase (wanda aka sanya a cikin akwatin rajista) ya samu amsa mai sauri fiye da 5,000.

claim: Wani mai sharhi mai suna Charlie Kirk ya ce, idan ya sami 'yar shekara 10 da ta yi ciki bayan da aka yi mata fyade, zai so ta haifi jaririn.
evidence: Bayan da aka kashe mai ra'ayin mazan jiya Charlie Kirk a ranar 10 ga Satumba, 2025, a wani taron da aka yi a Jami'ar Utah Valley, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta sun raba labarai da yawa da ke dauke da kalaman da Kirk ya yi. Ɗaya daga cikin irin wannan ikirarin da aka raba a dandamali da yawa shi ne cewa Kirk ya taba cewa idan ya sami 'yar shekara 10 da ta yi ciki bayan da aka yi masa fyade, zai so ta haifi jariri. Masu karanta Snopes sun bincika shafin don neman ƙarin bayani game da ikirarin. Wani sakon da Feminist News (@feminist_news_now) ya raba mun gano cewa wannan ikirarin na gaskiya ne. Ya fito ne daga wani bidiyo na 2024 da Jubilee ya wallafa a YouTube mai taken "Can 25e Students Omart 1 bit Conservative?"

claim: Tabbatar da Gaskiya: WHO ba ta amince da maganin gida don COVID-19 ba, kada ku fada cikin rashin fahimta.
evidence: Ko da yake muna son mu gaskata cewa irin wannan abu gaskiya ne, har zuwa yau, babu magani ko magani, musamman maganin gida da aka gano yana da tasiri wajen kawar da cutar. WHO ko wani irin hukumar kiwon lafiya ba ta amince da su ba. Da'awar tana magana ne game da cakuda da aka yi da kayan dafa abinci masu sauƙi kamar turmeric, ginger da zuma wanda idan aka sha tsawon kwanaki biyar zai iya murkushe yaduwar kwayar cutar. Duk da cewa duk waɗannan na iya aiki a matsayin manyan masu yaki da kwayar cutar (kuma suna taimakawa wajen magance mummunan sanyi), babu gaskiya ga da'awar cewa wannan maganin gida zai iya warkar da COVID-19.

claim: Gwamnatin Indiya tana ba da kuɗi ga iyalan da suka yi makoki saboda COVID-19 - Za a iya neman fa'idodin inshora don mutuwar Covid-19 a ƙarƙashin tsarin PMJJBY da PMSBY na Gwamnatin Indiya.
evidence: Ana raba sakon a shafukan sada zumunta da yawa tare da ikirarin cewa ana iya neman fa'idodin da ke karkashin Shirin Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) da Shirin Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) don mutuwar da ta shafi COVID-19. ikirarin: Ana iya neman fa'idodin da ke ƙarƙashin Shirin PMJJBY da PMSBY don mutuwar da ta shafi COVID-19. Gaskiya: Duk da yake gaskiya ne cewa shirin PMJJBY yana da amfani ga mutuwar COVID-19, akwai wasu sharuɗɗa game da cancanta da tsarin da'awar. Shirin PMSBY yana biyan kawai ga haɗari kuma daga yau, babu wani sabuntawa game da haɗa COVID-19 da ya shafi shari'o'in a cikin PMSBY.

claim: Gwamnatin Trump ta yi ikirarin cewa marubucin waƙar Billie Eilish tana lalata ƙasarmu a cikin takardun da aka ɓoye
evidence: Wani labarin da Washington Post ta wallafa ya yi zargin gwamnatin Trump da zargi Billie Eilish da "halaka kasarmu" sannan ta yada kamar wuta a tsakanin masana'antar nishaɗi. Labarin da aka wallafa a ranar Alhamis a wani bangare game da daruruwan shahararrun da ake bincika don yakin neman talla na gwamnatin Trump game da cutar coronavirus ya hada da wani zance da aka yi da ba daidai ba daga Fadar White House game da Eilish. Donald Trump yana lalata kasarmu da duk abin da muke sha'awar, mai rairayi mai cin kyautar Grammy ya ce a taron majalisar dokokin 'yan Democrat a watan Agusta. Da yake ambaton takardun da aka samu daga 'yan majalisar dokoki na 'yan Democrat, Washington Post ta rubuta ba daidai ba cewa jami'an Trump sun bayyana Eilish a matsayin 'ba mai goyon bayan Trump ba, amma tana lalata kasarmu da duk abin da muke sha'awar.

claim: A shekarar 2013, dan kasuwa kuma mai gabatar da shirye-shiryen talabijin Donald Trump ya ce: "Dakatar da gwamnati ta sa shugaban kasa ya rasa jagoranci. Ina nufin, matsaloli suna farawa daga saman kuma dole ne a warware su daga saman.Dakatar da gwamnati na nufin shugaban kasa yana da rauni".
evidence: A lokacin da gwamnatin Amurka ta rufe da aka fara a ranar 1 ga Oktoba, 2025, wani jita-jita da aka yada a yanar gizo cewa, a 2013, sa'an nan kuma dan kasuwa da kuma TV mai watsa shirye-shiryen gaskiya Donald Trump ya ce: "Gwamnati ta rufe a kan shugaban kasa rashin jagoranci. Ina nufin, matsaloli fara daga sama da kuma dole ne a warware daga sama. A rufe yana nufin shugaban kasa ne rauni. "A cewar memes da kuma posts da quote shugaban kasa, Trump  wanda ya yarda a lokacin 2025 downtime  ya fitar da wadannan kwanaki kafin a rufe gwamnatin a lokacin da sa'an nan shugaban kasa Barack Obama ta biyu lokaci a 2013.

claim: "A cikin shekaru 12 kawai tun lokacin da aka haifi wannan tsarin, mun yi amfani da kudaden da suka kai tiriliyan KSh4 ga yankuna.
evidence: Amma shugaban kasar ya yi ta wuce gona da iri kan yawan mutanen da suka yi rajista a eCitizen, dandamali na ayyukan dijital na gwamnati, kuma wasu ba su iya tabbatar da ikirarinsa game da biliyoyin da aka tara ta hanyarsa ba. Shugaban majalisar gwamnoni Ahmed Abdullahi ya yi daidai cewa kudaden da aka ba da na gundumar sun kai tsakanin 10 da 13% na kasafin kudin kasar. A watan Agusta na shekarar 2025, shugaban kasar William Ruto ya shiga cikin gwamnonin Kenya 47 a gundumar Homa Bay, kimanin kilomita 400 kudu maso yammacin Nairobi, don taron sadaukar da kai na shekara-shekara . A shekara ta 12, wasu sun soki dandalin a matsayin " ɓata lokaci da kuma albarkatun ƙasa " amma sau da yawa ana ganin shi a matsayin mabuɗin hanyar da aka tura wa tsarin dijital, yanzu muna ba da tabbacin ci gaban da gwamnatin ta samu, kuma Rightocom ta aika miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga gundumar ta 2010, inda ta tura miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga tsarin sadaukar da kai, yanzu muna ganin ta hanyar da ake amfani da shi na dijital, da kuma Rightocom ta tura miliyoyin daloli zuwa ga gwamnatocin kasar.

claim: Zababben magajin birnin New York Zohran Mamdani ya ce zai ba da umarnin a kama Firayim Ministan Isra'ila Benjamin Netanyahu idan ya zo birnin New York.
evidence: A lokacin yakin Zohran Mamdani na shekarar 2025 na shugabancin birni mafi girma a Amurka, jita-jita ta bazu a kan layi cewa zababben magajin gari ya yi alkawarin yin umarnin a kama Firayim Ministan Isra'ila Benjamin Netanyahu idan ya taɓa tafiya zuwa New York City. A cikin sakonni a kan X, Facebook da Reddit an yi ta yada wannan ikirarin. Mamdani, dan jam'iyyar Democrat da kuma mai goyon bayan Falasdinu na dogon lokaci, ya ce a cikin hirarraki da aka yi masa a cikin tef cewa zai yi kokarin girmama umurnin da Kotun Laifuka ta Duniya ta bayar don a kama shi bisa zargin da aka yi wa Firayim Ministan ICC na New York. A matsayin irin wannan, mun yi ikirarin cewa Mamdani Netanyahu zai ba da damar yin wannan ziyarar.

claim: Cin Hanci da rashawa: Shugaban Czech Petr Pavel ya amince da Ukraine ta rasa yankuna Don tsira
evidence: A wata hira da BBC, Petr Pavel ya jaddada cewa kasashen yamma ba sa amincewa da canja wurin yankuna zuwa Rasha kuma suna goyon bayan kare 'yancin kai na Ukraine, ba don amincewa da yardar rai ko mika ƙasa ba. Kafofin yada labaran yada labarai sun yi amfani da wata hira da shugaban Czech Petr Pavel ya yi da BBC don ya karkatar da maganarsa kuma sun yi ikirarin cewa wannan shugaban ya amince da cewa Ukraine ba za ta iya 'yantar da yankunan da ta mallaka ba kuma dole ne ta amince da mallaka ta don kare rayuwarta.

claim: iPhone 12 ba zai zo tare da belun kunne da kuma adaftan caji ba.
evidence: Ta hanyar cire caji da belun kunne daga akwatin samfurin, Apple ya ce zai rage fiye da tan miliyan 2 na fitar da carbon a kowace shekara, wanda ya yi daidai da cire kusan motoci 450,000 daga kan hanya a kowace shekara. Apple kuma yana cire adaftan wutar lantarki da EarPods daga marufi na iPhone, yana ƙara rage fitar da carbon da kuma guje wa hakar ma'adinai da amfani da kayan ado masu daraja, wanda ke ba da damar ƙananan marufi da haske, kuma yana ba da damar jigilar akwatuna da yawa da kashi 70 cikin dari akan pallet.

claim: Babban zunubi da kuma abin takaici na mujallar Faransa ta Charlie Hebdo ta zargi tsattsarkan fuskar Annabi ya sake bayyana ƙiyayya da kuma tsananin ƙiyayya da ci gaban da cibiyoyin siyasa da al'adu na Yammacin duniya ke yi wa addinin Islama da al'ummar musulmi.
evidence: Wannan batu ya samu tallace-tallace masu yawa, amma ya jawo zargi daga kungiyoyin Musulmi da yawa. Shugaban Faransa Jacques Chirac ya fitar da wata sanarwa a lokacin yana cewa, Duk abin da zai iya cutar da imanin wani, musamman imanin addini, ya kamata a guji.Ya kamata a yi amfani da 'yancin magana cikin ruhun alhaki. Charlie Hebdo ya amsa ta hanyar buga wata wasika, wacce marubuta da ma'aikata 12 suka sanya hannu ciki har da Salman Rushdie da Ayaan Hirsi Ali, wanda ya karanta, a wani ɓangare, Mu, marubuta, 'yan jarida, ma'aikata, muna kira ga juriya ga mulkin kamala na addini da kuma inganta' yanci, daidaito na dama da dabi'u na duniya ga kowa. A shekara ta gaba, manyan kungiyoyin Musulmi biyu na Faransa, Masallacin Paris da kuma kungiyar kungiyoyin Musulunci ta Faransa sun kai karar Charlie Hebdo don sake buga zane-zanen Danish.

claim: Beetroot amla karas ruwan 'ya'yan itace iya warkar da mataki 4 ciwon daji a cikin kwanaki 40
evidence: Shin shan beetroot, amla, da ruwan 'ya'yan karas zai iya magance cutar kansa ta zamani? Shin shan beetroot, amla, da ruwan 'ya'yan karas zai iya magance cutar cutar cutar kansa ta mataki na 4? A'a. Babu wata hujja ta kimiyya da ta nuna cewa beetroot, amla, da ruwan 'ya'yan karas na iya magance cutar ta mataki na 4. Duk da cewa wadannan ruwan 'ya'yan itatuwa suna ba da abinci da antioxidants, binciken da ke tallafawa tasirin su na maganin cutar kansa ya iyakance ga binciken dakin gwaje-gwaje ko na dabbobi. Ba su da tabbacin maganin cutar kansa. Masana sun ba da shawarar yin amfani da kawai magungunan da aka amince da su na likita da kuma tuntuɓar likitoci kafin gwada duk wani magani na madadin. An sabunta shi a ranar 3 ga Yuli, 2025 ta Dr. Priyamvada Quick Take A kafofin watsa labarun sun yi ikirarin cewa beetroot, amla, da ruwan 'ya'yan karas na iya magance cutar ta ciwon daji ta mataki na 4 a cikin kwanaki 40. Bayan binciken gaskiya, mun gano cewa wannan ikirarin ƙarya ne.

Ana iya ganin bayanan da aka adana a nan da nan.

evidence: A binciken da Vishvas News ta yi, ta gano cewa hoton da ya yi amfani da wutar lantarki ba na kwanan nan ba ne, amma na wani abin da ya faru a baya. evidence: A lokacin da gwamnatin tarayya ta ci gaba da rufewa har zuwa mako na hudu a karshen watan Oktoba 2025, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta sun raba wani bidiyo da ya bayyana cewa shugaban majalisar wakilai na Amurka Mike Johnson, na jihar R-La, yana cewa 'yan Republican ba su da "hakki a kan gwamnati". claim: Kenneth Petty, mijin rapper Nicki Minaj, mai rijista ne a matsayin mai aikata laifukan jima'i.
evidence: A karshen watan Disamba na shekarar 2025, kungiyar masu ra'ayin mazan jiya, mai zaman kanta, da ba ta riba ba, Turning Point USA (TPUSA) ta gudanar da taron shekara-shekara a Phoenix, Arizona. Fitawar da ta yi ta haifar da tattaunawa mai karfi a dandamali kamar X, tare da wasu magoya bayan da suka yi mamakin bayyanar Minaj a wani taron siyasa mai ban sha'awa. Duk da haka, wasu masu sukar ba su yi mamakin hakan ba. Sun yi iƙirarin cewa mijin Minaj mai rijista ne kuma sau da yawa suna kwatanta waɗannan ayyukan da zargin da aka yi wa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump na lalata. evidence: QAnon wata ka'idar rikici ce mai ban mamaki da kuma rashin hujja da ta ce Donald Trump ya zama shugaban kasa ne da sojoji suka nada domin ya ceci kasar daga tarkon lalata mata. claim: Jackie Mitchell, wata yarinya 'yar shekara 17, ta kashe almara na baseball Babe Ruth da Lou Gehrig baya-baya a wasan 1931 tsakanin 'yan wasan Chattanooga Lookouts da New York Yankees.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa, jaridu da suka wallafa wasannin sun rubuta bugawar Mitchell. Wasu sun ce an yi wasan ne, amma babu wani rikodin da ya nuna cewa Ruth ko Gehrig sun yi watsi da wasan Mitchell da gangan. A cewar wasu sakonnin da suka yi ta yawo a yanar gizo na tsawon shekaru, wata yarinya matashiya ta sake buga wa almara na baseball Babe Ruth da Lou Gehrig baya-baya. Alal misali, wani sanannen rubutu (wanda aka ajiye) ya ce Jackie Mitchell mai shekara 17 ta ɗauki dutsen mai jefa kuri'a a wasan baje koli na Chattanooga Lookouts kuma ta kashe manyan 'yan wasan biyu a baya-baya, amma kwamishinan ya soke kwangilarta kuma ya kira wasan "mai wuya" ga mata kwanaki bayan nasarar Mitchell.

A watan Mayu, an yi ta yada wani ikirarin da aka yi a yanar gizo cewa Paparoma Leo XIV ya ba da lambar yabo ta diplomasiyya ga jakadan Iran Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari, wanda shi ne babban jami'in Vatican.

claim: A lokacin da ake sauraron manema labarai a kan Air Force One, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya ce "Shiru, Piggy!" ga wani ɗan jarida da ke tambaya game da sakin fayilolin Jeffrey Epstein.

Yayin da ake jiran kuri'ar majalisar dokoki game da dokar da za ta tilasta Ma'aikatar Shari'a ta saki abin da ake kira fayilolin Epstein, mutane da yawa sun yi zato game da abin da Epstein ya sani game da Trump. Bidiyon bidiyo da aka yada a Intanet yana cewa Trump ya kama wani ɗan jarida yana tambaya game da sakin fayilolin, yana cewa "Shiru, alade!" Hoton da ke sama na gaskiya ne kuma yana nuna Trump yana kiran wani ɗan jarida "piggy". Snopes ya sake nazarin hoton sau da yawa kuma ya kalli bayanan shaidu daga jirgin sama.

claim: Jiragen ruwan Philippine da na Malaysia sun yi tsayayya a kusa da Sabah a ranar 11 ga Agusta, 2025.
evidence: Wani bidiyon da wani tashar YouTube ta wallafa ya ce jiragen ruwan Philippine da na Malaysia sun shiga wani rikici a kusa da Sabah. Wannan ƙarya ne. Babu wani rahoto mai inganci da ya tabbatar da cewa irin wannan lamarin ya faru. Kasashen biyu sun ce an ƙirƙira wannan ikirarin. An buga a ranar 12 ga watan Agusta, bidiyon na tsawon minti 12 da na dakika 51 ya fara da wani labari da ya bayyana abin da ake zargin ya faru. An yi zargin cewa jirgin ruwan Philippine Navy BRP Magat Salamat ya kusanci jiragen ruwa masu kamun kifi a Tekun Sulu, ya sa jirgin ruwan kariya na Malaysia KD Pahang ya ba da gargadi mai ƙarfi ya umarci jirgin Philippine ya bar. Wani babban mai magana da yawun ya kara da cewa rikicin ya karu lokacin da jirgin ya ki janye janyewa. Wani mai magana da yawun ya ce: "Na tsawon sa'o'i, jiragen ruwan Philippine biyu sun yi ta yawo da mita daruruwan. bindigarsu da makamai sun iya ganowa a kowane tashar ruwa guda goma, kuma a cikin tekun Agusta daya ne kawai aka karaya wannan sakon da aka yi da cewa

claim: An ɗaga tutar Pakistan a wani taron da DMK ta yi.
evidence: Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa wani sako da ke dauke da taken da ke cewa: "Za ka iya duba sakon nan". Duk da yake a kallon ido, tutar IUML ta bambanta da tutar Pakistan a cikin zane da kuma rabo.

claim: New York Mets sun maye gurbin tutar Amurka da tutar Pride yayin da ake buga waƙar waƙar ƙasa a wasan ƙwallon ƙafa a ranar 13 ga Yuni, 2025.
evidence: Game da wannan darajar A tsakiyar watan Yuni na shekarar 2025, an yi yawo a yanar gizo a bidiyo na dakika biyar wanda ya nuna tutar Pride a kan jumbotron a filin wasa na Citi Field na New York Mets. Masu amfani da kafofin sada zumunta sun ce wannan tutar ta maye gurbin tutar Amurka yayin da ake rera waka ta kasa. Kodayake mutane ba su bayyana a wace wasa wannan ya faru ba, jita-jita ta bazu bayan taron na tara na shekara-shekara na Pride Night na tawagar, wanda ke bikin LGBTQ+ magoya baya da kuma shiga wasan baseball, a ranar 13 ga Yuni, wanda ya yi daidai da wasan da suka yi da Tampa Bay Rays. Wani mai amfani da X wanda ya raba clip (da aka adana) ya rubuta: "BREAKING - The New York Mets sun zabi nuna tutar Pride a maimakon tutar Amurka a lokacin waka ta kasa. " Duk da haka, sakon ya tara sama da ra'ayoyi miliyan 6 a lokacin rubuta wannan labarin.

claim: Sakataren Tsaron Cikin Gida na Amurka Kristi Noem ya gode wa Shugaba Donald Trump saboda rashin faruwar shekarar 2025 a Amurka, yana cewa, "Kun nisanta guguwar".
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa A lokacin taron majalisar da aka watsa a fili a ranar 2 ga watan Disamba, 2025, Noem ta ce da gaske, "Ya shugaba, kun yi nasara a lokacin guguwar ba tare da guguwa ba. Don haka, FEMA, FEMA ... ku, har ma kun nisanta guguwar ba, don haka muna godiya da hakan". Duk da haka, dariya mai saurin ji da kuma Noem ta ci gaba da yin tsokaci a kan FEMA ta nuna cewa ɗakin ya karɓi bayanin "kun nisanta guguwar" a matsayin ba komai ba ne kawai a cikin wani abin dariya. Wani jita-jita da ya yi ta yanar gizo a farkon watan Disamba na 2025 ya ce Sakataren Tsaro na Amurka Noem Kristiem ya gode wa Shugaba Donald Trump da ya nisanta guguwar daga kasar har zuwa lokacin guguwar 2025, bayan wani bayanin da Noem ya yi a lokacin taron majalisar dattijai a Fadar White House a ranar 2 ga watan Disamba.

claim: A karshen watan Afrilu na 2026, 'yan majalisar dattijai ta Minnesota sun kada kuri'arsu da baki daya don su yi adawa da cire matattu daga jerin sunayen masu jefa kuri'a na jihar.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar, 'yan majalisar dattijai na Minnesota sun kada kuri'ar da suka yi na 'yan majalisar dokoki na jihar Minnesota ta yi game da wani gyare-gyare da zai bukaci a cire matattu daga tsarin rajistar masu jefa kuri'a na jihar. 'Yan majalisar dattijai na jihar Minnesota ba su cikin jerin masu jefa kuri'a da suka yi rajista ba. Ana nuna su a matsayin "matattu" a cikin tsarin, wanda ke cire su daga jerin masu jefa kuri'a. Jami'an zabe na gida da na jihar suna amfani da bayanan matattu a cikin tsarin don kama mutanen da ke ƙoƙarin kada kuri'a ko yin rajista don kada kuri'a ta amfani da asalin matattu. A ƙarshen Afrilu 2026, wani da'awar da aka yada a kan layi cewa 'yan majalisar dattijai na jihar Minnesota Democratic sun "kawai" da baki ɗaya sun yi adawa da cire matattu daga jerin masu jefa kuri'a na jihar.

claim: "Mutane miliyan 12.4 na Afirka ta Kudu ba su da aikin yi. "  Mmusi Maimane
evidence: Mun duba biyar daga cikin da'awar shugaban kasa game da tattalin arziki, dukansu daidai ne. Ramaphosa yana kan kudi idan ya zo ga ci gaban GDP mai kyau, kasar da ke da mafi karancin farashin kudi a cikin shekaru 20 da kuma rage yawan kudaden shiga da kuma kudin karbar bashi. Da'awar biyar game da rashin aikin yi da mambobi daga fadin fannin siyasa suka yi duk sun kasance daidai ne, ko kuma sun kusa. John Steenhuisen na Jam'iyyar Democrat ya yi daidai cewa rashin aikin yi ya kasance a mafi ƙarancin matakinsa a cikin shekaru biyar, amma abokan aikinsa sun nuna cewa wannan har yanzu yana sa 'yan Afirka ta Kudu miliyan 12.4 marasa aikin yi, ciki har da 35.8% na baƙar fata Afirka ta Kudu. 'Yan jam'iyyar uMkhonto weSizwe sun yi kuskure game da yawan mutanen Afirka ta Kudu da ke girma da sauri fiye da tattalin arzikinta kuma sun rikita yawan gidajen da ba su da abinci, suna tattara lambobin su. A watan Fabrairu na 2026, majalisar dokokin Afirka ta Kudu (Ramaphosa) ta shekara-shekara ta nuna cewa a baya ga shugaban kasar, ya yi magana da alamun tattalin

claim: Stanley tumblers sun ƙunshi matakan haɗari na gubar wanda zai iya haifar da guba ta gubar yayin amfani da su yadda ya kamata.
evidence: Tuni a farkon shekarar 2024, tattaunawar kafofin sada zumunta ta mayar da hankali ne ga kasancewar gubar a cikin wadannan tumblers, tare da da'awar da dama game da yiwuwar haɗarin kiwon lafiya. Wannan ya haifar da tattaunawa ta jama'a game da lafiyar samfurin da kuma abun da ke ciki. Bincikenmu na gaskiya ya nuna cewa yayin da tumblers na Stanley suka ƙunshi ƙaramin gubar a cikin ginin su, gwaji mai zaman kansa ya nuna ƙaramin haɗari yayin amfani da su. Masu amfani da Facebook na Social Media Claim sun ce kofuna na Stanley suna da haɗari saboda gubar a cikin ginin su, suna ba da shawarar cewa zasu iya haifar da guba.

claim: Sunil Gavaskar ya ce "Virat Kohli ya horar da Anushka [Sharma] ne kawai a lokacin kulle kulle"
evidence: A wani labarin da aka wallafa a shafin Instagram kwana daya bayan da kungiyar Kohli ta Royal Challengers Bangalore ta yi rashin nasara a wasan IPL da Kings XI Punjab, Sharma ta yi jayayya da wani bangare na bayanin inda Gavaskar yake tattauna rashin atisayen Kohli da mai ba da shawara Aakash Chopra. Gavaskar ya ce 'Ba a samu damar yin atisayen da kuke bukata ba... Kuma a lokacin kulle-duka, ya yi atisaye ne kawai a kan wasan bowling na Anushka kamar yadda aka gani a bidiyon. Wannan ba zai isa ba.' Gavaskar yana magana ne game da wani harbi a kafafen sada zumunta da aka yi a lokacin kulle-dukan inda wani maƙwabci ya jefa wa Kohli kwallo daga farfajiyar gidansa.

claim: A karkashin gwamnan Michigan Gretchen Whitmer, akwai iyalai da yawa da ke rayuwa cikin talauci fiye da waɗanda suka riga ta yi.
evidence: Gwamna Gretchen Whitmer, mai neman takarar shugabancin jam'iyyar Democrat, kwanan nan ta rubuta game da nasarorin da ta samu yayin da ta shiga shekararsa ta ƙarshe a matsayin shugaban jihar Michigan. "Hanyarmu ta haifar da sakamako mai ban mamaki", Whitmer ya rubuta a cikin wata sanarwa ta 2 ga Fabrairu. "Kirƙirar K, kwalejin al'umma, da cin abinci na makaranta kyauta ga kowa. Iyalai da yawa da ke rayuwa cikin talauci". Sanarwar ta ta jawo hankalin Amurkawa game da damuwa game da araha, wanda zai iya zama babban batun masu jefa kuri'a a zaɓen tsakiyar lokaci, gami da takarar Majalisar Dattawa ta Amurka a Michigan. Shugaba Donald Trump ya yi alkawarin rage farashin kayayyaki, motoci da sauran abubuwa a kan MAGA-Meter, wanda ke bin alkawuransa na yakin neman zabe.

claim: Macy's na soke bikin godiya a birnin New York a shekarar 2025 saboda zaben magajin gari Zohran Mamdani ya so ya caji kantin sayar da kayayyaki da dala biliyan 10 don amfani da titin Fifth Avenue.
evidence: Bayan Zohran Mamdani ya lashe zaben magajin garin New York a farkon watan Nuwamba na shekarar 2025, jita-jita ta fara yadawa a yanar gizo cewa Macy's na soke bikin godiya na shekara-shekara saboda an zabi magajin garin ya caje kantin sayar da kayayyaki da miliyan 10 don amfani da Fifth Avenue. Alal misali, shafin Facebook na Amurka na Layin Tsaro na Ƙarshe (ALLOD) ya wallafa wani rubutu mai dauke da rubutu (wanda aka ajiye): 'Yan New York suna nadamar kuri'unsu bayan da Macy's ta sanar da cewa an kammala al'adar shekara 125 na bikin godiya. "Mayor-Elect Mamdani yana son mu biya dala miliyan 10 don haya na shekara-shekara na 5th Avenue na tsawon sa'o'i uku", in ji Shugaba na Macy Joseph A Barron, "Za mu yi ikirari".

claim: Labarin Punch da ke neman ta'aziyya a cikin dabba mai cike da kaya bayan an bar shi a lokacin haihuwa gaskiya ne.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar A farkon 2026, hotuna da bidiyo da ke nuna wani jariri na alade da ke riƙe da wani wasan wasan kwaikwayo na orangutan sun zama sananne a kafofin watsa labarun. A cikin shafukan yanar gizo  ciki har da a kan X, TikTok da Reddit claimed cewa "Punch the monkey" ya ƙi mahaifiyarsa kuma ya ɗauki stuffed dabba a kusa da ta'aziyya. yayin da Punch ya janyo zuciya a fadin duniya, m Snopes masu karatu bincika shafin yanar gizon don tabbatar da labarin ta halal. dama masu karatu musamman bincika bayani game da ko abun ciki game da watsi da monkey aka samar da wucin gadi. Punch jariri da goyon baya stuffed orangutan ne real, bisa ga official X account (archiveed) na Ichikawa City Zoo a Japan, Punch ta zama a matsayin wannan rubuce-rubucen. Zoo Aspers claimed da hannu-rubuce da aka ceto da Japan ta gidan yanar gizo, bayan da aka bar shi a matsayin wani m m m m m, kamar yadda yake nuna cewa wannan shafin yanar gizo ne na gaskiya, kamar yadda yake nuna cewa mu iyaye na Ichikawa Zoo

claim: Babban Alkalin Indiya na yanzu, B. R. Gavai, ya dawo da tambarin kotun koli na asali, wanda ke dauke da taken Satyameva Jayate, wanda aka canza zuwa Yato Dharmastato Jayah a lokacin da Babban Alkalin Chandrachud yake aiki.
evidence: Wannan sakon ya ce a lokacin da tsohon Babban Alkalin D. Y. Chandrachud yake mulki, Kotun Koli ta maye gurbin takensa daga 'Satyameva Jayate' zuwa 'Yato Dharmastato Jayah.' Ya kuma ce, babban alkalin kotun yanzu, B. R. Gavai, ya dawo da asalin tambarin kotun Koli, wanda ya ƙunshi taken 'Satyameva Jayate' (a nan, a nan, a nan, a nan). A cikin wannan labarin, bari mu bincika gaskiyar da ake da'awar da aka yi a cikin sakon. Ana iya samun fayil ɗin wannan sakon a nan.

claim: Dokar Ceton Amurka za ta tilasta wa Amurkawa su yi rajista (don kada kuri'a) kawai a ido, wani abu da kashi 5% kawai na Amurkawa ke yi a yau. "
evidence: Yayin da majalisar dattijai ta fara tattaunawa na kwanaki da dama game da wannan doka a ranar 17 ga Maris, shugaban majalisar dattijai Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., ya jaddada matsalolin da ya ce dokar za ta haifar. Dokar "za ta tilasta wa 'yan Amurka su yi rajista (suna jefa kuri'a) kawai a ido, wani abu da kashi 5% na 'yan Amurka ke yi a yau", in ji shi ga manema labarai. Schumer ya yi daidai cewa dokar za ta bukaci takaddun shaidar zama ɗan ƙasa da za a yi wa rajista don yin zabe. Amma ya yi kuskure game da yawan mutanen da ke yin rajista a ido, bisa ga bayanan tarayya. Rahotanni na tarayya sun nuna cewa ya fi hakan.

claim: Fasahar NASA ta gano wani "super-Earth" exoplanet da ke ba da "alamar ban mamaki".
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Masana kimiyya da ke amfani da NASA's Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite sun gano wani duniyar waje, wanda NASA ta ayyana a matsayin kowane duniyar da ke bayan tsarin hasken rana.Koyaya, "alamar ban mamaki" ta fito ne daga rahotanni da sakonnin kafofin watsa labarun game da binciken, ba NASA ba ko masu binciken da ke ciki. "Alamar ban mamaki" da ake zargin su ne a zahiri siginar wucewa da ake yawan lura da ita, wanda "yana bayyana duniyar waje ba saboda muna gani kai tsaye daga shekaru masu yawa na haske ba, amma saboda duniyar da ke wucewa a gaban tauraronsa tana da ɗan haske kaɗan, "in ji NASA. Wani jita-jita da ke yawo a shafukan sada zumunta a watan Janairu 2026 ya ce masana kimiyya sun gano wani "super-Earth" a cikin tsarinmu. Wani matsayi a kan X ya ce an sake yin wannan da ake kira super-Earth, TOI-1846b, shekaru masu haske da yawa, amma saboda duniyar da ke wucewa a gaban tauraronsa ta ɗan ɗan haske, "kamar yadda ake magana game da wannan, har ila yau, an sake yin jita-jita

claim: Hotunan daga Iran sun nuna tashar jiragen ruwa ta Dayyer a Bushehr da ke konewa sakamakon hare-haren da Isra'ila ta kai.
evidence: Wani bidiyo ya bayyana a yanar gizo da ake zargin yana nuna wani abu daga wani hari da Isra'ila ta kai Iran a ranar 13 ga Yuni. Wasu masu amfani sun ce ya nuna wuta a wani tashar jiragen ruwa a lardin Bushehr, kudancin Iran, bayan wani hari da Isra'ila ta kai a baya a ranar.

claim: A wani musayar imel da abokin aikinsa Ghislaine Maxwell ya yi da Kwamitin Kula da Harkokin Wajen Majalisar Dattijai ya saki a watan Nuwamba na shekarar 2025, mai aikata laifukan jima'i Jeffrey Epstein ya kira shugaban Amurka Donald Trump "kare da bai yi bargo ba" kuma ya bayyana cewa Trump ya shafe sa'o'i da yawa shi kaɗai tare da wata mai cin zarafin jima'i a gidan Epstein.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar jita-jita sun bazu a kan layi a watan Nuwamba na shekarar 2025 cewa an yi musayar imel tsakanin mai aikata laifin jima'i Jeffrey Epstein da abokin aikinsa Ghislaine Maxwell ya nuna Epstein ya bayyana Shugaba Donald Trump a matsayin "kare wanda bai yi bargo ba" kuma ya ce shugaban ya "ci gaba da yin awanni" a gidan Epstein tare da wanda aka yi wa fataucin jima'i. Wannan jita-jita ta bazu a shafukan sada zumunta bayan sanarwar cewa Epstein ya saki sama da takardu 20,000 ga Kwamitin Kula da Kula da Gwamnati da Gwamnati. Masu amfani da dandamali na sada zumunta kamar Facebook (da aka adana), X (da aka adana) da kuma Reddit sun yi ta yada wannan ikirarin, tare da hotunan hotunan allo na imel ɗin da ake magana a kai.

claim: Majalisar Kwallon Kafa ta Duniya (ICC) ta fitar da wata sanarwa, inda ta haramta hukumar buga wasan kwallon kafa ta Pakistan na shekara guda.
evidence: Kungiyar kwallon kafa ta duniya ta ICC ta fitar da wata sanarwa, inda ta haramta tawagar kwallon kafa ta Pakistan har shekara guda. (Archive Link) "Sanarwar" ta yi ta yaduwa a gaban gasar cin kofin duniya ta 2026 T20, inda Pakistan ta shiga cikin gwagwarmayar rukuni A da India a mako mai zuwa a Colombo.A baya, Pakistan ta sanar da cewa ba za ta dauki mataki ba a wasan da za a yi a ranar 15 ga Fabrairu da Indiya, ko da yake gwamnati ta soke halartar tawagar ta kasa a sauran gasar da za ta fara a ranar 7 ga Fabrairu.

claim: An gano wani girgije mai suna Sheld Cloud a kan Haridwar a ranar 18 ga Disamba, 2025.
evidence: A binciken da aka yi a kan shafin Vishvas News, an gano cewa bidiyon da aka yi na "gigigijen shiryayye" a Haridwar ba na kwanan nan ba ne, amma ya fara ne a watan Yuli na 2023. Ana raba tsohon bidiyon a shafukan sada zumunta tare da da'awar ɓatarwa, yana nuna shi a matsayin wani abu da ya faru a ranar 18 ga Disamba, 2025. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Wani bidiyon da ya nuna wani babban girgije na girgije yana yin yawo a shafukan sada zumunta.

claim: Shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya kira Russell Vought, darektan ofishin gudanarwa da kasafin kudi, "Darth Vader" a jawabinsa na Oktoba 2025.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Trump ya ci gaba da jawabinsa tare da yabon Vought kuma ya nuna cewa masu sukar suna kiransa Darth Vader: "Suna kiransa Darth Vader. Ina kiransa mutumin kirki. Amma yana yanke abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci ga 'yan Democrat kuma ba za su sake dawo da su ba". A lokacin jawabin da ya yi a fadar White House a watan Oktoba na shekarar 2025 a Rose Garden, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya kira Russell Vought, darektan ofishin gudanarwa da kasafin kudi, "Darth Vader", sunan wani muguwar hali daga jerin fina-finai na "Star Wars". A cewar hotunan da suka yi ta yawo a yanar gizo, yayin da Trump bai ambaci sunan TikTok ba, ya nuna wa wani a cikin taron da ke sauraron jawabinsa ya ce: "Muna da Darth Vader, ka san Darth Vader, dama?

claim: Bayan da Sakataren Tsaro Pete Hegseth ya kori Shugaban Rundunar Sojan Ruwa John Harrison a watan Oktoba na shekarar 2025, hukumomi sun kama Harrison bisa zargin cin amana.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa A watan Oktoba na shekarar 2025, bayan da Sakataren Tsaro Pete Hegseth ya kori Shugaban Rundunar Sojan Sama John Harrison, wani labari ya bazu a yanar gizo cewa hukumomi sun kama tsohon babban jami'in Sojan Sama bisa zargin cin amana. Alal misali, wani mai amfani a kan X ya wallafa ikirarin: Masu binciken JAG na Sojan Sama na Amurka a ranar Juma'a sun kama wani babban jami'in Sojan Sama a gidansa mai kayatarwa kusa da Yardin Sojan Sama na Washington, sa'o'i bayan da Sakataren Sojan Amurka Pete Hegseth ya kori shi saboda rashin cancanta, kamar yadda Real Raw News ta sani. Wasu masu karatu sun bayyana cewa jita-jita ce ta gaskiya ce game da abubuwan da suka faru a rayuwa ta ainihi. claim: Azumi yana kashe kwayoyin cutar kansa a cikin kwanaki 15
evidence: A cikin wani bidiyo na Facebook, mai da'awar ya ce idan aka taɓa gano mata ciwon daji, za ta yi azumi na kwanaki 15 saboda ta yi imanin azumi yana kashe ƙwayoyin cutar kansa. Shin azumi yana kawar da cutar a cikin kwanaki 15 bayan ganewar asali? A'a. Babu wata hujja ta asibiti da ta nuna cewa azumi yana warkar da cutar kansa a cikin kwanaki 15 ko ma. Ciwon daji ba cuta guda ɗaya ba ne. Ya ƙunshi fiye da yanayi 200 daban-daban, kowannensu tare da ilimin halitta na musamman, tsarin ci gaba, da amsa ga magani. Wasu ƙwayoyin cuta suna girma da sauri; suna girma a hankali. Wasu suna amsawa da kyau ga maganin sinadarai; wasu, masu niyya, ko maganin rigakafi. Babu wata hanyar ilimin lissafi da ta tabbatar da cewa azumi yana ba da damar kawar da ciwon daji gaba ɗaya a cikin makonni biyu ko ma. Koyaya, nazarin ƙwayoyin cuta da aka kafa da sauri ko kuma a cikin ƙananan kwayoyin cuta na iya canzawa zuwa ga tsarin sarrafa kansa na yau da kullun.

claim: Wani kamfani da mai bayar da tallafi mai suna Bill Gates ya goyi bayan shi ya samar da man shanu da aka yi a dakin gwaje-gwaje ta amfani da carbon.

Gates ba shi da hannu a gudanar da Savor ko jagoranci, a cewar wani mai magana da yawun Savor. A watan Agusta na 2025, da'awar da ta bazu a kan layi cewa wani kamfanin da Bill Gates ya goyi bayan ya fara samar da man fetur da aka yi da carbon, maimakon kayayyakin kiwo. Rumor ya yi ta hanyar Intanet ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce a kan X, Facebook da Reddit. A cewar wani shafin yanar gizo na 2024 da Gates ya wallafa, a zahiri, ya saka hannun jari a cikin wani kamfani mai suna Savor, wanda ya sanar da ƙaddamar da man fetur da aka yi da shi "kai tsaye daga carbon ba tare da buƙatar aikin gona na al'ada ba" a watan Maris na 2025.

evidence: Game da wannan darajar, 'yan kabilar Kambodiya da ke tafiya don neman zaman lafiya sun gode wa Trump saboda rawar da ya taka wajen matsa wa shugabannin Kambodiya da Thailand su amince da tsagaita wuta bayan rikici tsakanin kasashen biyu. Duk da cewa Trump ya ba da gudummawa ga tsagaita wuta, bai "karya da yaƙi" tsakanin Kambodiya da Thailand ba. Tsagaita wuta ta faru ne bayan kwanaki 5 na rikici a kan iyakar tsakanin kasashen biyu, ba yaƙi ba, kuma tsagaita wuta tana nufin dakatar da rikici na ɗan lokaci, ba ƙarshen dindindin ba. A watan Agusta na 2025, wani da'awar da ta bazu a kan layi cewa wani rukuni na 'yan kabilar Kambodiya sun gode wa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump saboda kawo karshen yakin da ke tsakanin ƙasarsu da Thailand. Yawancin posts sun haɗa da hoto ɗaya ko fiye da suka bayyana suna nuna 'yan kabilar da ke riƙe da hotuna na Trump.

claim: Tomas Cole Allen, wanda ake zargi da kai hari a taron cin abincin dare na 'yan jarida na fadar White House na 2026, dan Democrat ne da ya yi rijista kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga tsohon mataimakin shugaban kasa Kamala Harris na yakin neman zaben 2024 na shugaban kasa.
evidence: Bayan kama Cole Tomas Allen, mutumin da ake zargi da yunkurin kashe Shugaba Donald Trump a liyafar tarayyar wakilan fadar White House a karshen watan Afrilu 2026, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta da sauri suka fara danganta Allen da Jam'iyyar Democrat. A rubuce-rubucen da ke kan dandamali kamar X, Facebook da Threads sun yi ikirarin cewa Allen dan Democrat ne da aka yi rajista; wasu rubuce-rubucen sun yi ikirarin cewa ya ba da kudi ga tsohon mataimakin shugaban kasa Kamala Harris na 2024 na zaben shugaban kasa. Wasu masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta, kamar mai koyar da ka'idar hada-hadar 'yan adawa Laura Loomer, sun yi ikirarin duka biyu. Masu karanta Snopes sun kuma bincika shafin yanar gizon don neman bayani game da zargin da ake yi da Allen da kuma ba da kyautar jam'iyyar Democrat. Duk da haka, a gaskiya, a cewar Allon, akwai takardun shaida na cewa Allen ya yi rajistar jam'iyyar ta tarayya da kuma ba da rajistar jam'iyyar ta tarayya.

claim: Kungiyar ta Black Lives Matter na son halakar da iyalin nukiliya.
evidence: Muna sa wurarenmu su zama na iyali kuma muna ba iyaye damar yin cikakken aiki tare da yaransu. Muna kawar da aikin da ke cikin mulkin mallaka wanda ke buƙatar uwaye su yi aiki double shifts don su iya zama uwa a zaman kansu ko da suna shiga aikin shari'a na jama'a. Muna lalata tsarin tsarin iyali na nukiliya da yammacin Turai ya tanada ta hanyar tallafa wa juna a matsayin iyalan da aka faɗaɗa da kuma ƙauyuka waɗanda ke kula da juna, musamman yaranmu, har zuwa matakin da iyayen, iyaye, da yara suke jin daɗi. Muna haɓaka cibiyar sadarwar da ke da'awar gay. Lokacin da muke yin hakan, muna yin hakan da nufin 'yantar da kanmu daga ƙuntataccen tunanin heteronomic, ko kuma, imani cewa duk a duniya heterosexual ne (ba tare da shi / ita ko sun bayyana hakan ba). Muna haɓaka cibiyar sadarwar zamantakewa da kuma sadarwar zamantakewa ba tare da shekaru ba. Mun yi imani da cewa mutane, ba tare da la'akari da shekaru, suna iya koya da juna, ko kuma suna nunawa.

claim: Fake: 'Yan gudun hijirar Ukraine sun sace gidan Louvre
evidence: Kafofin yada labarai da kuma shafukan sada zumunta na pro-Kremlin suna yada jita-jita cewa an ce 'yan gudun hijira na Ukraine sun sace abubuwa masu daraja daga gidan kayan gargajiya na Louvre a birnin Paris. A cikin wadannan sakonnin akwai hotunan mutanen da ake tsare da su, kuma suna cewa wadanda ake zargin 'yan Ukraine ne da suka sace Louvre. A cikin wadannan sakonnin akwai hotunan maza biyu da ake zargin an tsare da su a ranar 19 ga Oktoba, 2025, inda ake zargin an sace duwatsu tara na kayan ado daga gidan kayan gargajiya na Napoleon Collection.

claim: An cire Virat Kohli da Rohit Sharma daga sabon jerin wasannin wasannin wasannin kwallon kafa na ICC, wanda hakan ya haifar da tunanin cewa za su yi ritaya.

Ana iya ganin bayanan da aka ajiye a nan. Fact Check Newschecker ya fara bincika jerin abubuwan da aka sanya a cikin shafin yanar gizon ICC ODI batting, inda muka gano Rohit Sharma da Virat Kohli sun kasance a matsayi na biyu da na hudu, daidai da jerin masu cutarwa.

claim: Tun farkon watan Nuwamba na shekarar 2025, gwamnatin shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ta yi amfani da kudaden shiga na dala miliyan 750 wajen tallafawa shirin na musamman na karin abinci ga mata, jarirai da yara.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa A lokacin rufe gwamnatin tarayya a farkon watan Nuwamba 2025, masu amfani da shafukan sada zumunta sun yi ikirarin cewa shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya yi amfani da kudaden shiga na dala miliyan 750 na haraji don ci gaba da gudanar da shirin na musamman na abinci mai gina jiki na mata, jarirai, da yara. Majalisa ta kasa bayar da kudaden shiga na shekara guda ga shirye-shiryen tarayya da yawa, ciki har da shirin  da aka sani da WIC  kamar yadda 'yan majalisa suka kasance cikin matsala game da sake buɗe gwamnati. Sakonnin da suka yi magana akan rahoton Politico sun ce an tura dala miliyan 450 na kudaden haraji a ranar 31 ga Oktoba, bayan an yi wani canja wurin da aka yi a baya a watan Oktoba  tare da kudaden shiga na dala miliyan 750 na haraji da aka yi amfani da shi don tallafawa WIC. Sakonnin sun sa masu karatu da yawa Snopes su aika mana da imel kuma bincika shafin yanar gizon mu don tabbatar da cewa gwamnatin Trump ta yi amfani da dala miliyan 750 na haraji don ci gaba da gudanar da WIC.

claim: Shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya ba da shawarar cewa masu amfani da motocin da ke amfani da dizal su koma gas din don rage farashin man fetur.

A cikin sakon an buga wani hoto mai suna meme wanda ya nuna hoto na Trump da Firayim Ministan Ireland Micheál Martin zaune a Oval Office  da ake zargin yana kusa da jan kwalban gas. Kalmomin da aka nuna a kasan hoton sun karanta, "Trump ya ba da shawarar masu amfani da motoci su sauya zuwa gas din don rage farashin man fetur".
