claim: Tsohon shugaban Amurka Barack Obama ya cire wani gunkin tsohon Firayim Ministan Birtaniya Winston Churchill daga ofishin Oval kuma ya mayar da shi Ingila.
evidence: A lokacin da Obama ya hau kan mulki, fadar White House ta mayar da fadar da aka yi masa na Churchill a waje da dakin yarjejeniya a lokacin mulkinsa. Babu wata hujja da ta nuna cewa fadar Bush ta koma fadin tekun Atlantika a farkon mulkin Obama. Wannan fadar ta kasance a ofishin jakadancin Birtaniya da ke Washington, D.C., har zuwa akalla 2012, a cewar rahotanni da suka yi magana game da ofishin jakadancin. Wanda ya yanke shawarar mayar da fadar Churchill da Birtaniya ta bai wa Bush bai bayyana ba a lokacin rubuce-rubucen wannan labarin. Obama ya bayyana a lokacin taron manema labarai na 2016 cewa ya yanke shawarar maye gurbin fadar Churchill da daya daga cikin Martin Luther King Bush. Rahotanni sun nuna cewa fadar shugaban kasar Amurka ta kammala ne a watan Maris 2026, kuma tsohon shugaban kasar Amurka Donald Trump ya sake cewa fadar da aka yi wa Bush ta koma fadar White House a watan Maris 2026, kuma ya nuna cewa fadar shugaban kasar ta kammala ne a lokacin da aka sake dawo da fadar.

claim: Jawabin mataimakin ministan Sri Lanka game da hukuncin kisa da kotun kotun ta yanke
evidence: "A cikin mutane 12 da aka yanke hukuncin kisa, babu wani daga Malimawa. 'Yan jam'iyyar JVP ne da Peratugami - Mataimakin Minista Chathuranga Abeysinghe", in ji rubutun Sinhala a kan hoton Facebook da aka raba a ranar 11 ga Fabrairu, 2026. Ya hada da hoton Mataimakin Ministan Masana'antu da Ci gaban Kasuwanci na Sri Lanka, Chathuranga Abeysinghe, da kuma alamar kamfanin dillancin labarai na gida Newswire (wanda aka adana a nan da nan). "Malimawa" - kalmar da ke nufin "guje" - tana nufin kawancen hagu na kasar da shugabancin shugaban kasa Anura Dissaraathaatha Dissanayake ke jagorantar jam'iyyar Vimukthi Peramuna (JVP) ta shugaban kasa, yayin da "Pugami" ke nufin Jam'iyyar Socialist Party, wani bangare na jam'iyyar Janar Janata Janata Janata (JVP) (wanda aka rarraba a nan da nan da kuma a nan).

claim: A watan Agusta na shekarar 2025, Sanata Rick Scott na jihar Florida ya bayyana fiye da dala miliyan 26 a cikin kasuwancin jari sama da shekara guda bayan lokacin da doka ta tanada.
evidence: A watan Agusta na shekarar 2025, asusun X na Unusual Whales ya wallafa wani ikirarin da ya nuna cewa Sanata Rick Scott, dan Republican na Florida, ya bayyana fiye da dala miliyan 26 a cikin ma'amaloli na hannun jari "fiye da shekara guda". Irin wannan jinkirin zai zama keta dokar tarayya, wadda ta bukaci dukan 'yan majalisar (da wasu mutane da ke kewaye da su) su bayyana duk wani cinikin da ya shafi dukiya mai daraja fiye da dala 1,000 a cikin kwanaki 30. Wannan ikirarin ya bazu a shafukan sada zumunta, kuma masu karanta Snopes sun bincika shafin don neman karin bayani game da jinkirin da aka yi. Duk da haka, mun yi ikirarin cewa, an gano wasu dalilan karya, saboda haka, muna kiran daraktan da ke kan shafinmu na Unusual Whales da kuma daraktanmu na farko na Sashen Sashen Sashen Sadarwa na Whales Scott, don mu tuntubi wasu daga cikin shafukanmu na farko na Unusual Whales.

claim: Mutumin da ba dan kasar Amurka ba ne ya zabi Mamdani a zaben magajin garin NYC.
evidence: Shin wani wanda ba dan kasar Amurka ba ko ma mazaunin ya isa birnin New York kwana biyu kafin zaben ya zabe Mamdani a matsayin magajin gari? A'a, ba gaskiya bane: A kan faifan ya yarda cewa wannan wani abun dariya ne. Don ya fallasa abin da suke yi, sun nuna inda suka sami hoton wani takardar zabe da ke nuna sunan Zohran Mamdani. Masu jefa kuri'a da ba su yi rajista ba a New York da ke yin rajista a wurin zabe, ana ba su takardar zabe ta daban, da aka gabatar da takardun rajista da suka hada da takardun shaida da ke tabbatar da cewa suna zaune a New York. Wannan ikirarin ya bayyana a cikin asusun X.com na 4 ga Nuwamba, 2025 @YazanXBT post (wanda aka ajiye a nan) wanda ya buɗe: Na isa NYC kwanaki 2 da suka gabata ban zama dan kasar Amurka ba ko kuma ina da Mam Mam din da nake so in shiga kuma abin da suka fara gani kamar na ba su adireshin mazaunin V. Na ba su adireshin da suka isa a shafin Twitter na New York ba.

claim: Freddie Mercury, mai waƙar waƙar, bai rera "na duniya" ba a ƙarshen waƙar "We Are the Champions, Queen", wadda aka fara fitar a 1977.
evidence: Amma duk da haka ... ... layin ya kasance a cikin kalmomin waƙar kamar yadda aka buga a cikin sleeve na cikin 1977 vinyl saki na hukuma. Bugu da ƙari, bidiyo na Queen concerts ya nuna Mercury sau da yawa ya raira waƙa da layin a karshen. tun da Queen ta "We Are the Champions" ya fara a 1977, mutane da yawa sun punctuated su renditions na song da wani m "na duniya. " Amma shi ke da gaske yadda shi ƙare? Wasu masu sauraro, bayan sake duba song a kan vinyl da kuma a kan music-stream dandamali kamar Spotify, lura da cewa karshe "na duniya" ba a samu a ko'ina.

claim: Janar George Patton Jr. ya ce, "Allah ya ji tausayin magabtana, domin ba zan yi hakan ba".
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Patton ya yi tunani iri ɗaya, ko da yake yana da ƙarshensa daban.Zarin asalin, wanda za a iya samu a cikin littafinsa na 1947 na tunawa, "War as I Knew It", ya ce: "Allah ya ji tausayin magabtana; za su bukaci shi".Har yanzu ba mu sami wani rikodin da ya tabbatar da cewa Patton ya taɓa yin magana ko rubuta jumla, "Allah ya ji tausayin magabtana, domin ba zan yi ba".Na tsawon shekaru masu amfani da kafofin watsa labarun suna raba wani da ake zargin cewa ya yi magana da Janar George Patton Jr., inda ya ce shugaban sojojin yakin duniya na biyu ya taɓa cewa, "Allah ya ji tausayin magabtana, domin ba zan yi ba".A misali, a shekara ta 2021, wani mai amfani da ke kula da shafin yanar gizon Arkansas na Twitter na Twitter ya sake yin wannan bayanin yayin da yake tunawa da maganar da aka yi a Pearl Harbor na Disamba 7, 1941.

claim: Shugaban kungiyar mata ta AIMIM ya taya Deepak Kumar murna.
evidence: Wani hoto ya yi ta yawo a shafukan sada zumunta, inda ake zargin cewa shugaban kungiyar mata ta All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul Muslimeen (AIMIM) mai horar da mata mai suna Deepak ya shiga tsakani da shi, yana gaishe da wani mutum mai suna "Mohammad Deepak." (Hanyar da aka saka a cikin Archives) Wane ne Mohammad Deepak? An san sunan 'Mohammad Deepak' a ranar 26 ga Janairu, 2026, a lokacin wata takaddama a Kotdwar, Uttarakhand, a wani gida da ake yi a kan wani shagon tufafi da wani Musulmi ya mallaka, mai suna Baba School Garments. A lokacin gardama, wani mai horar da mata mai suna Deepak Kumar ya shiga tsakani. Lokacin da aka yi masa tambayoyi game da asalinsa a cikin tashin hankali, ya gabatar da kansa a matsayin "Mohammad Deepak".

claim: "Mun riga mun dawo da layin [rail] 35 da suka kasance a cikin bacci ko kuma ba su da aiki. "  Ramaphosa
evidence: Ra'ayin Ramaphosa game da rashin nasarar da Cape Town ke samu wajen fadada samun damar yin amfani da ayyuka yana da ɓata kuma ba za a iya tabbatar da da'awarsa cewa birnin yana zuba jari ƙasa da kowane mutum a cikin garuruwa da kuma wuraren zama ba bisa ka'ida ba. Africa Check ta kuma ƙididdige da'awar Badenhorst game da kashi na kasafin kuɗin da ake kashewa a cikin kayayyakin more rayuwa na Cape Town zuwa ga iyalan da ke da ƙananan kuɗi ba a tabbatar da shi ba, amma yana da gaskiya cewa an ba da gudummawar shekara uku ga birnin fiye da na sauran manyan biranen da ke cikin ƙasar.

claim: Fake: Manya yanzu sun cancanci yin aikin soja a Ukraine
evidence: A gaskiya, dokokin Ukraine ba su ba da izinin shiga aikin soja ga mutane da ba su kai shekara 18 ba. Bayanan da aka danganta ga wani dan majalisar dokokin Ukraine gaba daya ba gaskiya ba ne. Kafofin watsa labarai da ke da alaƙa da Kremlin sun yi ta yada jita-jita cewa Ukraine ta ba da izinin 'yan shekara 17 su rattaba hannu kan kwangila tare da Sojojin Sojoji. Rahotanni sun yi ƙaulin wani sanannen sanannen sanannen sanannen sanannen sanannen gidan talabijin na dan majalisar dokokin Ukraine Ruslan Horbenko, wanda aka ce ya ce an ba da izinin shiga aikin soja tun yana da shekara 17.

claim: Asaduddin Owaisi yana yin aikin aarti ga Ubangiji Hanuman a cikin haikali.
evidence: Wani bidiyon da ke yawo a shafukan sada zumunta ya nuna shugaban AIMIM Asaduddin Owaisi yana yin Hanuman aarti, tare da wasu mutane, ciki har da wani firist, da aka gani tare da shi. Masu amfani sun raba bidiyon sosai, suna ikirarin cewa shi na gaske ne. Screengrab daga wani sakon X na @ManojSr60583090 Shaida Mun bincika rahotanni na kafofin watsa labarai na Asaduddin Owaisi yana ziyartar wani haikali ko yin aarti, amma ba mu sami wani labari mai tabbatarwa ba. Idan haka ne, ba kawai hotunansa yana yin aarti ba, amma kuma labarai da suka shafi shi za a yi magana a kai a kai a kafofin watsa labarai da kuma harkokin siyasa.

claim: Wasikar da aka raba ta yanar gizo a watan Maris na 2026 ita ce ainihin saƙon da Joe Kent, shugaban Cibiyar Tsayayya da Ta'addanci ta Kasa ta Amurka, ya sanar da cewa ya yi murabus saboda yakin Amurka da Isra'ila da Iran.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa A watan Maris na 2026, Joe Kent  darektan Cibiyar Tsayayya da Ta'addanci ta Kasa ta Amurka kuma mai goyon bayan Shugaba Donald Trump tun shekarar 2020  ya sanar da murabus, yana mai cewa, yakin da Trump ke yi da Iran. Hotuna da rubutu da ake zargin suna nuna wasikarsa ta sauka daga wannan aikin sun bazu a yanar gizo, kuma masu karanta Snopes sun bincika shafin kuma suka rubuta don gano ko wasikar ta kasance ta gaske. Wasikar ta kasance na gaskiya; Kent ya wallafa ta a farkon ranar 17 ga Maris, 2026. A wannan lokacin rubuce-rubuce, sakon X (wanda aka adana) ya kai ra'ayoyi sama da miliyan 94. Hoton wasikar yana da taken: Bayan tunani mai yawa, na yanke shawarar yin murabus daga matsayina na Daraktan Cibiyar Tsayayya da Ta'addanci ta Kasa, daga yau. Ba zan iya tallafawa masu sana'ar da ke gudana a Iran ba. Iran ba ta da wata barazana mai zuwa ga al'ummarmu, kuma a bayyane yake cewa mun fara wannan yaƙin ba da girmamawa da kuma daga ikon da ake

claim: A cikin fim din "Forrest Gump", mai suna "Forrest Gump", ya ce, "Rayuwa kamar akwati ne na cakulan", ba "Rayuwa kamar akwati ne na cakulan ba".
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar Layin da ɗan wasan kwaikwayo Tom Hanks ya yi magana a matsayin Forrest Gump a cikin fim ɗin shine: "Mahaifiyata koyaushe tana cewa rayuwa tana kama da akwati na cakulan. Ba ku taɓa sanin abin da za ku samu ba". A wani wuri dabam, mahaifiyar halin ta ce: "Rayuwa akwati ne na cakulan, Forrest. Ba ku taɓa sanin abin da za ku samu ba. Babu wani daga cikin waɗannan bayanan da suka dace da ƙa'idar da aka yi amfani da ita sosai, "Rayuwa kamar akwati ne na cakulan". Ɗaya daga cikin layin da aka fi ambata a tarihin fim din ya fito ne daga fim din "Forrest Gump", na 1994 wanda Tom Hanks ya taka rawar gani. Yayin da Gump ya ba da labarin rayuwarsa ga baƙi a tashar bas a farkon fim ɗin, ya ba da wani abu mai hikima daga mahaifiyarsa.

claim: Wani rikici tsakanin wani ministan BJP da wani mai karbar kudin gundumar a Uttar Pradesh
evidence: Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa wani bidiyo da ke nuna cewa akwai wani rikici tsakanin wani ministan BJP da wani ministan gundumar a Uttar Pradesh. Wani mai amfani da Facebook ya wallafa wani labari da ke nuna cewa an yi wani rikici tsakanin ministan gundumar da ministan BJP....a UPR...😁 Yaƙin tsakanin ministan gundumar da ministan BJP....A UP... 😁 Za ku iya duba sakon a nan. FACT CHECK NewsMobile ta duba sakon da ya yi amfani da shi kuma ta gano cewa hakan ba gaskiya ba ne. Don tabbatar da wannan ikirarin, an cire wasu bayanai daga bidiyon da aka yi amfani da shi kuma an bincika su ta hanyar yin amfani da bincike na hoton baya. Wannan ya haifar da wani rahoto da aka wallafa ta hanyar Live Live a ranar 17 ga Janairu, 2018, wanda ya nuna irin wannan hoton.

claim: Sakataren tsaron Amurka Pete Hegseth ya ce: "Yana da matukar wahala a duba cikin kungiyoyin yaki, ko kuma a zahiri kowane rukuni, da ganin sojoji masu kiba, kuma haka ma, ba shi da kyau a ga manyan jami'ai da manyan jami'ai masu kiba a cikin dakunan Pentagon da kuma manyan hukumomi a fadin kasar da kuma duniya".
evidence: A ranar 30 ga Satumba, 2025, Sakataren Tsaron Amurka Pete Hegseth ya kira taron manyan janareta a sansanin Quantico Marine Corps da ke Virginia, a abin da kafofin yada labarai da yawa suka kira taron na karshe.A lokacin taron, Hegseth ya ba da jawabi ga jami'an da suka taru inda ya ce ya soki "mai kiba" soji da janareto.Masu amfani da kafofin sada zumunta da yawa sun nuna sassan jawabin Hegseth.A wani rubutu a shafin X an ce: Hegseth ya kira "sojoji" da janareto.Ya ce a gaba, kowane memba na sabis zai buƙaci wuce gwajin jiki sau biyu a shekara idan suna son kasancewa memba na rundunar.Ya ce kasancewa mai kiba soja "ba za a karɓa ba".Ya ce Hegs ya soki "mai kiba" soji da janareto kuma ya kira shi don gyara irin wannan bayanin na jiki.Ya ce, a shafin yanar gizon Ashe Hegseth ya fara yin wannan bayanin a matsayin mai kyau.

claim: Bayanan gwamnatin Amurka da aka fitar sun tabbatar da cewa gwamnatin shugaban Amurka Donald Trump na gwada "ƙuntatawa na tafiya na cikin gida" a cikin iyakokin kasar a tsakiyar shekarar 2025.
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Wani jita-jita da aka yada a kan layi a farkon watan Yuli na 2025 ya yi ikirarin cewa an yi leaked US gwamnatin memo tabbatar da gwamnatin shugaban Amurka Donald Trump da aka gwada "na ciki tafiya restrictions" a cikin US iyakoki wani daban-daban da shirin da ya haramta tafiya da hannu a wasu kasashe. Snopes masu karatu searched mu site for bayani game da wannan al'amari. Daya mai karatu ya gabatar da Facebook reel Meta sunan gajeren bidiyo a Facebook da Instagram  nuna footage na Trump da mota da gangami a Netherlands a watan Yuni 2025, kazalika da general filin jirgin sama footage, gida labarai shirye-shirye da kuma stock videos. da reel nuna taken, "Breaking news: Next phase? Travel restrictions within the U.S. now under internal discussion". da reel a yanzu a karkashin ciki tattaunawa. "Sauran masu amfani a kan THS, sun kuma samu a cikin sa'a guda guda da bidiyo ko kuma guda da aka raba tare da guda A.

claim: 'Yan sanda: Masu fafutukar siyasa ba su haddasa gobarar Oregon ba.
evidence: Wani guguwar iska mai ban mamaki da kuma ta musamman a tarihi ta mamaye tudun Cascade a yammacin Litinin, Satumba 7 zuwa safiyar Talata, Satumba 8, wanda ya haifar da saurin ci gaban gobarar daji.Wannan nau'in iska ba shi da kyau a wannan lokacin shekara; ana ganin iska mai ƙarfi da irin wannan ƙarfin a cikin watanni na hunturu.

claim: Hotunan na gani sun nuna fashewar Delhi Red Fort da ta faru a ranar 10 ga Nuwamba, 2025.
evidence: A ranar 10 ga watan Nuwamba na shekarar 2025, wata mota ta fashe kusa da Gate No. 1 na tashar jirgin kasa ta Red Fort a New Delhi, inda aka kashe akalla mutane goma sha uku, wasu kuma suka jikkata. An mika binciken ga Hukumar Bincike ta Kasa (NIA), inda hukumomi suka yi kira ga Dokar Ayyuka (Tsare-tsare) da kuma bincika hanyoyin da ake danganta da wani bangare na ta'addanci (a nan, a nan). Bayan wannan lamarin, wasu hotunan sun fara yawo a shafukan sada zumunta, suna cewa suna nuna hotunan fashewar Red Fort na Delhi. Bari mu tabbatar da da da'awar da aka yi a cikin wadannan posts a wannan labarin.

claim: Wani bincike ya gano cewa kashi 23 cikin dari na Amirkawa ne kawai ke iya nuna Iran a taswirar.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar binciken na 2020 ya gano cewa kashi 23% na masu jefa kuri'a na Amurka da aka yi rajista  ba duk Amurkawa  ba ne suka iya gano Iran daidai a kan taswirar duniya ba. A watan Maris na 2026, yayin da yakin Amurka da Isra'ila da Iran ya ƙaru, sakonnin da ke yawo a shafukan sada zumunta sun ce kashi 23% ne kawai na Amurkawa za su iya nuna Iran a taswirar. Sakonnin sun ƙunshi zane-zane da ke nuna taswirar Gabas ta Tsakiya kuma ana raba su ne don sukar ilimin ƙasa ko ilimin siyasa na Amurkawa. Alal misali, wani mai amfani da X ya raba hoto mai taken "An nemi Amurkawa su nuna Iran a taswirar duniya", yana cewa: "Ina fata wannan ba gaskiya bane..." Hoton ya ce "23% sun gano Iran daidai. "Manyan yawancin Amurkawa ba za su iya gano Iran a taswirar ba", wani mai amfani da shafin yanar gizon ya faɗi.

claim: 'Yan majalisa a Indiana sun yi kokarin fitar da wata doka da za ta ba jihar damar kashe mutane ta hanyar dakunan gas da kuma tawayen harbi.
evidence: Game da wannan ƙimar 'yan majalisun Indiana sun yi ƙoƙarin wuce dokar da za ta ba jihar damar aiwatar da hukuncin kisa ta amfani da gas na nitrogen ko tawagar harbi. Dokar ta gaza wucewa. Idan ta zama doka, ba a san ko jihar za ta gina ɗakunan gas ba. Jihohin da suka riga sun yi amfani da gas na nitrogen don kisa suna gudanar da shi ta hanyar rufe fuska, kodayake an ruwaito cewa Arizona ta sake gyara ɗakunan gas na gidan mutuwa don yiwuwar amfani a nan gaba. A farkon shekara ta 2026, an yi ikirarin cewa 'yan majalisun Indiana sun yi ƙoƙarin wuce dokar da za ta ba da izinin kisa ta hanyar ɗakunan gas da tawagar harbi. Rumor ya yada a dandamali kamar Facebook, X, TikTok da Instagram. Masu karanta Snopes sun kuma rubuta don tambayar Indiana cewa tana gina ɗakunan gas. Wannan ikirarin yana buƙatar mahallin. 'Yan majalisun Indiana sun gabatar da doka da ta dace da doka da za ta ba da izinin kashe mutane ta hanyar kashe mutane ta hanyar amfani da gas na nitrogen da aka yi amfani da shi a cikin gidan yari na jihar, wanda ke nufin cewa ta hanyar Janairu 2026 ta yi amfani

claim: Italiya ba ta yarda jami'an SSU su bi tawagar Ukraine zuwa wasannin Olympics ba.
evidence: A cewarsa, Italiya ta yi zargin cewa ba ta ba da izinin Ukraine ta tura ma'aikatan Jami'ar Tsaro ta Ukraine 120 su bi tawagar ta kasa a wasannin Olympics na 2026 ba. Ta kuma ce ma'aikatar wasanni ta Italiya ta ba da amsa, ta ce wannan bukatar ba ta dace ba kuma ta jaddada 'yancin 'yan Ukraine na samun 'yancin yin motsi. Amma, wannan ƙarya ce. Reuters ba ta wallafa irin wannan bidiyon ba. Ma'aikatar wasanni ta Italiya ba ta yi irin wannan bayani ba. Hoton hotunan hotunan hotunan hotunan na gidan yanar gizon Reuters ba ta wallafa irin wannan bidiyon a shafin yanar gizon ta ba, ko a Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, ko X. Masu tallata labaran sun yi kokarin kwafin asalin bidiyon. Duk da haka, masu gabatar da labarai na Reuters ba su yi amfani da tambarin hoton fitowar ba, yayin da bidiyon ya yi.

evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Gwamnatin Obama ta amince da biyan dala biliyan 1.7 ga Iran a shekarar 2016 kuma daga baya jami'an Amurka sun amince da cewa an yi wannan canja wurin ne gaba daya a cikin kudi ba na Amurka ba saboda takunkumin da suka yanke Iran daga tsarin kudi na yau da kullun da ke kan dala ba. Rahotanni a lokacin sun bayyana farkon kashi na dala miliyan 400 da suka isa a kan pallets na waje a ranar da Iran ta saki fursunonin Amurka. Kudin ba kyauta bane, kyauta ko kyauta ta son rai daga Obama ga Iran. Ya wakilci warwarewar takaddama ta doka ta shekaru da yawa game da dala miliyan 400 da Iran ta biya Amurka, kafin juyin juya halin Iran na shekarar 1979 don kayan aikin soja da ba ta samu ba, da kuma dala biliyan 1.3 a cikin sha'awa. A shafukan sada zumunta na sada zumunta an bayyana cewa canja wurin da ake kira Obama "ba da" kudi ga Iran ya yi watsi da wannan mahallin.

claim: Najeriya ita ce babbar mai samar da cassava a Afirka da kuma duniya.
evidence: Najeriya ita ce mafi girma a duniya mai samar da cassava, inda ta kai kashi ɗaya bisa biyar (21%) na yawan yawan kayayyakin da ake samarwa a duniya. Ana bukatar cassava da kuma abubuwan da ke cikinta sosai a cikin tattalin arzikin kasar. Sai dai, samarwa ba ta iya biyan bukatar ba. Alal misali, rata tsakanin bukatar da ake samu na babban cassava mai inganci na kimanin tan 485,000 (MT) a shekara, yayin da rata tsakanin cassava starch da ake samu na kimanin tan 290,000MT. PwC ta kiyasta cewa Najeriya za ta bukaci kimanin tan 28.3 miliyan na tushen cassava da aka shuka a kowace shekara a fadin fadin fadin kadada miliyan 1.2 don biyan bukatar kasar ta na cassava da aka samar da kayayyakin da aka samo daga ita.

evidence: A watan Yuli na shekarar 2025, ICE ta ba da kyautar shiga biyar da kuma wata albashi mai yuwuwa na kimanin dala 100,000 don komawa hukumomin shiga tsakani. Wannan tayin daga hukumar ya fi na matsakaicin malami a Amurka. Mafi daidai, hukumar ta ba da har zuwa dala 50,000, ba dala 45,000 ba, a matsayin kyautar shiga tsakani, kuma albashi ga wani jami'in ICE a wannan matsayi ya kasance daga dala 88,621 zuwa dala 144,031 kamar yadda aka rubuta. Cikakken kyautar da aka bayar yana samuwa ne kawai har zuwa ranar 1 ga Agusta, 2025, kuma ga tsoffin ma'aikata ne kawai. Albashi ga gogaggun malamai  a matsayin kwatancen kai tsaye ga ICE da ke komawa aiki  sun kasance kusan daidai da na tsohon jami'an shiga tsakani. ICE ba ta amsa wata tambaya ba nan da nan game da ko za a karɓi sabon jami'in shiga tsakani da kuma ko za a samu kyautar shiga tsakani na dala 100,000 a shekara, kuma ko za a samu kyautar dala 45,000 a kan layi, kuma idan masu shiga tsakani na so su shiga cikin kwastam na Amurka da ke gudana a shekara

claim: Fake: Mai ba da shawara ga Zelensky Chrystia Freeland ita ce zuriyar Nazi mai ba da shawara.
evidence: Kakakin Chrystia Freeland, Mykhailo Khomiak, ya yi aiki a matsayin editan jaridar Krakivski Visti a lokacin mulkin Jamus. Shi ɗan jarida ne na farar hula wanda ke aiki a ƙarƙashin tsananin tsaron Nazi, duk da haka, kuma babu wata hujja cewa shi ɗan yaƙi ne ko kuma ya shiga cikin ayyukan azabtarwa. Kafofin watsa labarai da ke da alaƙa da Kremlin sun ruwaito cewa shugaban Ukraine Volodymyr Zelensky ya nada Chrystia Freeland a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan ci gaban tattalin arziki, yana bayyana ta a matsayin 'yar wani ɗan Nazi. claim: A watan Maris na 2026, Janar Michel Yakovleff na Faransa, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaba a NATO, ya ce, Faransa ta taimaka wa Amurka wajen tabbatar da tsakar Hormuz zai zama daidai da "sayen tikiti mai arha zuwa Titanic".
evidence: Bayan makonni biyu bayan fara yakin Amurka da Iran, jita-jita ta fara yadawa cewa Janar Michel Yakovleff na Faransa, wanda ya yi aiki a manyan mukamai a NATO, ya ce Faransa ta taimaka wa Amurka ta tabbatar da Tekun Hormuz daga hare-haren Iran zai zama kamar "sayar da tikiti masu arha zuwa Titanic", jirgin ruwan jirgin ruwa mai daraja wanda ya buga wani dutse mai zurfi kuma ya nutse a kan tafiyarsa ta farko daga Ingila zuwa New York City a shekara ta 1912. Wasu sakonnin kan layi sun yi ikirarin, ciki har da a Facebook. Wani sakonni a kan X sun hada da bidiyo na minti uku na Yakovleff yana cewa wannan a cikin wani tashar talabijin ta Faransa (wanda aka adana): Sakon ya karanta, a wani ɓangare: Janar Michel Yakov na Faransa da ya yi ritaya a kan Faransa bai kamata ya shiga ƙungiyar Hormuz ta Trump ba: Lokaci ya yi da ba zai so ya sayi tikiti don rawa mai zurfi ba.

claim: "Uganda tana da shigarwa, kimanin masu yawon bude ido miliyan 1.2 ne ke shigowa".
evidence: A akasin haka, Gregory Mugisha Muntu ya yi daidai a lokacin da ya ce kashi 70 cikin 100 na 'yan Uganda sun dogara da aikin gona, amma ya yi watsi da yawan masu yawon bude ido don yaɗa rata da ke tsakanin makwabta da Tanzania. Frank Bulira Kabinga ya yi wasu da'awar rashin gaskiya game da Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa, ciki har da albashin ma'aikatan da ke yin hijira daga Filipinos. Joseph Elton Mabirizi ya yi watsi da girman rundunar 'yan sanda da sojojin Uganda. A ranar 30 ga Nuwamba, 2025, biyar daga cikin 'yan takarar shugaban kasa takwas a zaben Uganda na 2026 sun shiga cikin muhawara ta talabijin, suna nuna hangen nesa game da kasar Gabashin Afirka. Uku daga cikinsu, ciki har da shugaban kasar Museveni, wanda aka sani da Robert Syagiri, wanda ya fi son ya shiga cikin shekaru 81 na mulkinsa, ya yi watsi da matsayin shugaban kasa na hudu, wanda aka sani da cewa, zai yi nasara a matsayin shugaban kasa na kasar.

claim: George Stephanopoulos, mai watsa shiri na shirin ABCs "This Week", ya katse hira da mataimakin shugaban Amurka JD Vance bayan da Vance ya karkatar da wata tambaya game da sarkin iyaka Tom Homan.
evidence: A ranar 12 ga Oktoba, 2025, bayyanar mataimakin shugaban Amurka JD Vance a shirin "This Week" na ABC ta ƙare ba zato ba tsammani a yayin tattaunawa game da Tom Homan, dan majalisar dattijai na White House, wanda ya yarda da cin hanci da rashawa na dala 50,000 don taimakawa jami'an asirin "cin kwangila a gwamnatin Trump ta biyu", a cewar wani rahoto na MSNBC da aka buga a watan Satumba. A lokacin tattaunawar, Vance ya sake tura tambayoyin mai watsa shiri George Stephan Pritzker game da abin da ya sani game da Homan da kuma cin hanci da rashawa da ake bayarwa, don yin magana game da rushewar gwamnatin Amurka, wanda Vance ya zargi 'yan Democrat.

claim: Ma'aikatan Burtaniya da ba za su iya yin aiki a yankunan matakin 3 ba za su sami haɗin Shirin Tallafin Ayyuka da Karin Albashi na Duniya, wanda ke nufin za su sami kashi 80% na albashi.
evidence: Don yin da'awar, dole ne ma'aikaci ya yi aiki aƙalla kashi 33% na sa'o'in da suka saba yi domin a ga aikin a matsayin mai amfani kuma saboda haka ya cancanci a ƙarƙashin wannan tsarin. Gwamnati za ta biya kashi ɗaya bisa uku na sa'o'in da ba a yi aiki ba (har zuwa iyaka), tare da mai ba da aiki ya ba da kashi ɗaya bisa uku. Ragowar kashi ɗaya bisa uku da ba a biya ba ita ce ainihin gudummawar da ma'aikaci ke bayarwa ga tsarin. Wannan yana nufin cewa ma'aikaci yana samun kashi 77% na albashi na al'ada inda ba a iyakance gudummawar Gwamnati ba. Lura cewa har yanzu akwai wasu bayanai da za a saki daga HMRC game da abin da ke cikin albashi na yau da kullun, musamman ga waɗanda albashi ya canza tun watan Maris zuwa sabon yarjejeniyar albashi tare da masu ba da aikinsu, da kuma wasu daga cikin mafi kyawun bayanai game da yadda tsarin tallafin aikin zai yi aiki.

claim: "Bombing da aka yi wa cibiyoyin samar da wutar lantarki a cikin farar hula laifi ne na yaki.
evidence: A ranar 21 ga watan Maris, Trump ya rubuta a Truth Social cewa "idan Iran ba ta bude gaba daya ba, ba tare da wata barazana ba, da Tekun Hormuz, a cikin sa'o'i 48 daga wannan lokacin, Amurka za ta kai hari kuma ta shafe cibiyoyin wutar lantarki daban-daban, farawa da mafi girma daya da farko!" Ko da yake daga baya Trump ya tsawaita wannan lokacin sau biyu, ya ce a Truth cewa "idan Tekun Hormuz ba a bude shi nan da nan ba, za mu kammala kyakkyawar rayuwarmu a Iran ta hanyar busawa da kuma shafe dukkan cibiyoyin wutar lantarki, da kuma wuraren samar da mai (mai yiwuwa) da kuma Kharg Island, harin da Trump ya ce "ba a yi ba ne, amma har yanzu ana iya yin irin wannan harin a kan sojojinmu", amma "ba a yi niyyar ba".

claim: Cibiyoyin bayanai da aka gabatar a jihar New York za su yi amfani da kusan sau biyu na yawan amfani da makamashi na dukkan gidaje a jihar tare.
evidence: Yayin da yawancin 'yan Amurka ke la'akari da farashin da kuma amfanin gina manyan cibiyoyin bayanai don ilimin kere-kere da sauran bayanan dijital, 'yan majalisar dokoki biyu na New York sun bukaci jihar ta dakatar da irin wadannan ayyukan, suna mai cewa za su iya cutar da masu amfani da muhalli da kuma muhalli. A wani labarin da aka wallafa a Albany Times-Union a ranar 5 ga watan Maris, Sanata Liz Krueger da 'yar majalisa Anna Kelles sun yi kira ga dakatar da ayyukan, suna cewa cibiyoyin bayanan da aka gabatar a jihar za su bukaci "ƙididdigar wutar lantarki ta 9.5 gigawatt, wanda ya ninka yawan amfani da wutar lantarki da duk gidaje a jihar suka yi a hade". 'Yan majalisar dokoki biyu na New York suna la'akari da dakatar da ci gaban cibiyoyin bayanai har sai da akwai isasshen makamashi don gudanar da ayyukan da aka gabatar.

claim: A watan Maris na 2026, shugaban Amurka Donald Trump ya ce game da Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman na Saudi Arabia, "Ba ya tsammanin zai sumbace ni a**".
evidence: Game da wannan kimantawa Wani bidiyo da aka buga a yanar gizo a watan Maris na 2026 wanda ya bayyana ya nuna Shugaban Amurka Donald Trump yana cewa Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman na Saudi Arabia "ba ya tsammanin zai sumbaci a** na ba. " Bidiyon ya bazu a dandamali da yawa, kuma masu amfani da yawa a cikin sharhi sun nuna shakku game da gaskiyar bidiyon, suna tunanin cewa an ƙirƙira shi ta amfani da ilimin kere-kere. Masu karatu sun kuma nemi Snopes ya tabbatar da ikirarin A post shared by Indians (@indians) An ba da bayanin daidai ga Trump  ya yi wannan bayanin (a kimanin 43:02) yayin da ya bayyana a wani taro a Miami don Saudi Investment Initiative mai zaman kanta. Fadar White House ta wallafa wani bidiyo (da aka adana) na jawabinsa a YouTube a ranar 27 ga Maris, 2026. Mun fadada bayaninsa don nuna mahallin da ke kewaye da makomar nan gaba.
